description:
Arth: Revolutionizing the Construction Industry with Digital Solutions. 

Arth is dedicated to addressing critical challenges within the Architecture, Engineering, and Construction (AEC) industry. Through our customer-centric approach, we provide innovative services that empower businesses to transition from inefficient, people-dependent processes to data-driven digital solutions, resulting in heightened productivity and improved operational margins.

Our comprehensive suite of services caters to a range of industry professionals including Developers, Main Contractors, PMC Consultants, Engineering firms, Design Firms, Design Managers, and Modular Contractors. We understand the unique needs and pain points of each stakeholder, and our solutions are specifically crafted to meet their requirements effectively.

At Arth, we pride ourselves on our expertise, industry knowledge, and unwavering commitment to excellence. We collaborate closely with our clients, acting as trusted partners on their digital transformation journey. Together, we unlock the full potential of digital technologies, enabling unprecedented success in the ever-evolving construction landscape.

Join us in reimagining the future of construction. Connect with us to explore how our innovative digital solutions can propel your projects to new heights of success. Let's shape the built environment together.

description:
Obayashi Corporation (Singapore Office) established its operations in Singapore in 1965, predating Singapore’s history as a nation. The Singapore Office has since developed into one of the largest offices in Obayashi’s worldwide network. 

We are proud to be part of Obayashi Corporation's heritage and long history (https://www.obayashi.co.jp/en/). The predecessor of Obayashi Corporation was founded on January 25, 1892.  In February 1904, the company name was changed to Obayashi Corporation. The headquarter is in Minato, Tokyo, Japan.

From the very beginning, we have established a reputation of completing a string of iconic buildings such as the Tokyo Central Station (currently Tokyo Station) in 1914; the Hanshin Koshien Stadium (1924); and the reconstruction of the Main Tower of Osaka Castle (1931).  Since then, Obayashi Corporation has spread its wings to many other countries and the legacy of building iconic structures continues until today.

Since the start of operations in 1965, the Singapore Office has distinguished itself with numerous successful diverse projects. The East Coast Reclamation project began in 1965 and was Obayashi’s first major overseas civil engineering project in Singapore. Upon completion of the 20 year project in 1985, a total of 1,114 hectares (1.8% of Singapore’s land mass) had been reclaimed.

Obayashi Singapore Office has also contributed to Singapore’s landmark skyline with the construction of skyscrapers such as the Treasury Building (1986), SIA Building (1997), One Raffles Quay (2006), Ocean Financial Centre (2011) and Straits Trading Building (2009).

In January 2014, Obayashi’s operations in Singapore was formally localized into a subsidiary. Localization would enable the company to focus more on projects rooted in the region and enhance our track record that has made us one of the leading construction companies in Singapore.

We look forward to progress together with Singapore to the next 50 years milestone.

description:
Bachy Soletanche arrived in Singapore in the 1970’s. We are a subsidiary of the world’s foremost geotechnical specialist engineering contractor, Soletanche Bachy.

Involved on some of the country’s most outstanding infrastructure and iconic buildings, we have played a significant role to build the foundations to the Smart and Green city that Singapore is globally-recognised for today.

Our Vision is to be the preferred Geotechnical Contractor to Clients or Main Contractors, working as a partner or a specialist subcontractor. We strive to provide the highest value solutions to our Clients, bringing leading innovation and global competence to the local Singapore market. As a performance driven company, we are committed to the development of our people, within a culture of safety, innovation and excellence.
 
Since the 1980’s, the teams of Bachy Soletanche have been actively involved in the creation and expansion of the country’s mass transit rail network and large-scale underground projects for major infrastructure and building works, making Singapore a vibrant world class city with one of the most efficient transport systems in the world. Proud to have our name associated with more than 20 MRT stations both as a specialist subcontractor and as main contractor we remain the preferred specialist contractor for the most complicated and difficult underground structures. 
 
Soletanche Bachy Group is a main contractor specialising in geotechnical, soil technology, foundation works and civil engineering projects with a wide spectrum of geotechnical engineering processes, special foundations, underground works, ground improvement as well as pollution treatment and control.

It serves a wide range of clients in the public and private spaces including central and local governments, industrial, general building and civil engineering contractors as well as property developers. The company employs 12,000 employees in over 50 countries.

description:
'OUR MISSION IS TO CREATE SPACES OF EXTRAORDINARY SENSORY EXPERIENCE ROOTED IN CULTURE, MEMORY AND PLACE'.

WOW is an international consultancy offering professional design services in architecture, interior and landscape design, and masterplanning. 

An award-winning firm recognized for extensive experience in cross-border services, our projects span the Asian region and extend as far as the Middle East and North Africa. Our core competency lies in the areas of hospitality, residential and commercial design with strong lifestyle-driven concepts. 

Established as Warner Wong Design in the year 2000 by Wong Chiu Man and Maria Warner Wong, WOW has since evolved into a dynamic design group. 

Our process driven design leads to in-depth exploration and thought, resulting in a unique approach to each project rather than a particular formula or style. The firm’s creations are stylistically inclusive and diverse; they harbour a strong sense of place and timelessness that engage the senses whilst delivering a spatial product in response to a client’s vision and business objectives.

description:
China Harbour Engineering Company Ltd. (CHEC) is a subsidiary of China Communications Construction Company Ltd (CCCC), one of the Global Fortune 500 companies. CHEC has been developing and operating the oversea business on behalf of CCCC. Currently, CHEC has more than 60 oversea branch offices or subsidiaries serving clients in over 80 countries around the world.

CHEC is a leading provider of full services in Engineering-Procurement-Construction (EPC), Build-Operate-Transfer (BOT), and Public-Private-Partnership (PPP) for both public and private sectors. Our diverse infrastructure portfolio includes marine engineering, dredging and reclamation, road and bridge, railway, airport, equipment assembly. 

The Company has abundant expertise and experiences in other industries as well, such as building, municipal works, environmental, hydraulic engineering, power plant and energy, and resource exploration. By virtue of its advantages in technique, equipment, marketing and manpower, CHEC is providing prestigious services globally and becoming a world-renowned brand in the field of engineering.

description:
SAA is a leading full-service architecture practice headquartered in Singapore. With over 50 years of design and built expertise, we are committed to excellence in the design and delivery of people-oriented architecture. 

Guided by our core values of being Urbanistic, Humanistic, and Optimistic, our practice delivers projects that connect and engage seamlessly with the built environment; creating meaningful relationships by placing people and communities at the centre of our design.

SAA is a member of the Surbana Jurong (SJ) Group, a diverse and collaborative collective of problem-solvers for the built environment, continually reimagining ways to create a smart and sustainable future. As one of SJ’s 10 member companies, SAA is part of a global network of professionals in more than 120 offices in over 40 countries. 

The SJ architecture studio within the Surbana Jurong Group is now working together with SAA Architects. Together, we are a larger group of architectural professionals practising as an integrated team and a combined portfolio of work.

Today, nearly 300 multinational professionals from SAA collaborate closely with partners and clients, responding to design challenges in an increasingly complex and technology-driven world; bringing specialist expertise across sectors and typologies.

description:
Tremco Construction Products Group APAC has served as the benchmark for excellence and quality products since our first entry into the Asia Pacific market in 1984. description:
Park + Associates seeks to create coherent spaces where function and beauty speak a common language. For the firm, the dialogue of architectural elements shapes a space, takes it beyond its everyday, functional character. It is with this ethos that Park + Associates pursues a vision of architecture as a fundamental articulation of space and form, through which beauty and purity can be discovered.

The firm’s strategy is one of subtraction and control to preserve the necessary simplicity of spaces. Each project is undertaken with a rigorous eye for detail, placement and materials, with an artistic sensitivity to the “intangibles” of light, space and form. Charting a journey for the user in an unique space; creating sophisticated spaces that inspire, invigorate, and refine the senses – that is what Park + Associates sets out to achieve.

In tandem with its explorations of spaces, the firm remains sensitive to environmental concerns, seeking to appropriate eco-friendly materials and strategies into each project.

description:
Spark is an award-winning international architectural and design consultancy with proven expertise in architecture, urban design, landscape architecture and interior design. Founded by its four directors; Jan Clostermann, John Curran, Stephen Pimbley and Sven Steiner, and supported in London by director Max Titchmarsh, Spark works closely with clients to create architecture which improves the quality of life with each design capturing the essence of place and telling its personal story.
Driven by a philosophical approach to create architecture that is pragmatic, social and convivial, Spark designs buildings and environments that have longevity and that are intimately connected to their context and the people who use them. Spark's work employs the best sustainable practices, is driven by social inclusion and is underpinned by financial viability.
With a dynamic team of over 100 employees spanning 16 nationalities and three continents, Spark combines the best experienced, international and local talent within a proven a mature practice structure and supporting external advisory board that enhances the company’s capability to deliver complex, large-scale, multi-phased projects.
Spark continues to create award-winning projects across Europe, Asia and the Middle East from its offices in Beijing, London, Shanghai, Kuala Lumpur, Singapore and Abu Dhabi. Notable projects include the rejuvenated Clarke Quay in Singapore, the Shanghai International Cruise Terminal, Starhill Gallery in Kuala Lumpur and the Raffles City projects in Ningbo and Beijing.
For more information about Spark, please visit www.sparkarchitects.com.

description:
Formwerkz Architects was established in Singapore in 2004 by Alan Tay, Seetoh Kum Loon, Gwen Tan and Berlin Lee. The practice is largely defined and shaped by their common interest in the recovery of mutual human relationships, and the restoration of primordial relationships between man and nature. Projects become vehicles to design happenings or more precisely, the conditions that can espouse more active engagement between man and man with his environment.

In 2010, the 3 design partners (Alan Tay, Gwen Tan and Seetoh KL) were selected to be featured in AUDE’s “20under45: The Next Generation” exhibition, aim to promote a greater awareness and appreciation of design excellence in Singapore. The Apartment House was listed in Monocle’s Singapore Survey as one of the “Best of the Modern”, alongside the likes of Paul Rudolph’s Colonnade and I M Pei’s OCBC Bank. Formwerkz has received several awards: The Building of the Year and Design Awards from the Singapore Institute of Architecture (SIA); The International Architecture Award from the Chicago Athenaeum and the European Urban Centre for Architecture, Art, Design and Urban Studies; International Design Awards (IDA); Design For Asia Award by Hong Kong Design Centre; Dubai Cityscape Design Award.

description:

description:
The Watford Group is an international volunteer association consisting of professionals involved in railway architecture and design and the impact of heavy rail transport to its associated environment.

The members of the Watford Group come from railway administrations, institutions, companies and daughter companies as well as heavy rail transport and heavy rail infrastructure owners and operators. (Privat membership is excluded.)

Today it covers about 20 different countries including USA and Japan.

The Watford General Assembly of all delegations, held annually at the Conference, is the basic authority on all matters regarding the aims, the organisation and the administration of the Watford Group. It elects the steering group and the secretary.

The Watford Conference selects the host countries to hold the future Watford Conference and authorizes the Brunel Awards.

description:
At Exponent Pte Ltd, we design, build, and deliver commercial spaces that work as hard as you do. Founded in 2016, we’re a Singapore-based fit-out and construction specialist known for our hands-on approach, creative precision, and ability to execute complex projects—without disrupting your operations.

From workplace transformations and office renovations to retail interiors, F&B concepts, and boutique hospitality spaces, our team brings together interior designers, engineers, and project managers to deliver cohesive, fully integrated solutions. We manage every stage—from space planning and design submissions to MEP coordination and custom carpentry fabrication—so you only ever need one partner.

We’re also trusted by REIT managers and property owners for Asset Enhancement Initiatives (AEI). Whether upgrading aging assets, executing reinstatement works, or improving tenant experiences in live environments, we deliver with minimal downtime and maximum impact.

With BCA L6 in CR06, strong in-house technical capabilities, and a dedicated carpentry facility, we build with speed, precision, and accountability. No delays. No surprises. Just spaces that elevate your brand, optimise performance, and deliver long-term value.

Let’s build smarter.

description:
The American Concrete Institute – Singapore Chapter (ACI-SC), established in 1985, is committed to advancing the mission of the American Concrete Institute by promoting education, technical excellence, scientific research, and public service in the field of concrete. As a nonprofit organization, ACI-SC brings together professionals to share knowledge and improve the design, construction, manufacture, use, and maintenance of concrete products and structures.

ACI-SC proudly supports the National University of Singapore’s Endowment Fund, which sponsors an annual medal and book prize awarded to the top Civil Engineering graduate specializing in concrete technology.

Each year, the Chapter hosts the Performance Controlled Concrete Competition, inviting ready-mix concrete producers, admixture suppliers, universities, and polytechnics to submit their best concrete products for testing under various performance criteria. This event fosters innovation and collaboration across the industry.

To raise industry standards, ACI-SC conducts the Concrete Field Testing Technician Certification Course, equipping construction professionals with the skills to perform and document essential field tests on freshly mixed concrete. This course is recognized by the Singapore Accreditation Council under CT-06, and is a mandatory certification for batching plant operators.

Please note: The views expressed on ACI-SC’s social media platforms are those of individual contributors and do not necessarily reflect the views of ACI or its affiliates. ACI-SC disclaims liability for any injury, loss, or damage resulting from reliance on information shared via these platforms. For official guidance, always consult a qualified professional. Questions may be directed to admin@concrete.org.

description:
UTC is a technical consulting firm, founded by a team of Chartered Engineers/ PE with PhD in multi-disciplines. Expert areas include accident investigation, failure analysis, structural analysis, fire investigation, design and technical training.
UTC team consists of experts with > 35 years of relevant experience. As principal Investigator, successfully conducted thousands of projects for aerospace, marine, petrochemical, electronic/microelectronic, construction, amusement & government agencies including MOM, MOT, RSAF, Navy, PUB, Enterprise, SCDF, LTA, SMRT, RWS, SBS transit, Shell, ST Aerospace, Hyundai, ESA, SIA Eng., HP, Dell, Siemens, ST Marine etc.
UTC provides reliable & impartial reports in more efficient & cost effective way, which can stand up in any occasions including technical litigation in courts.
Typical Projects:
	Failure analysis on damages of roller coaster vehicle

	Investigation on train accident
	Investigation on accidents of cranes
	Failure analysis on aerospace engine damages

	Investigation on automotive steering system failures

	Failure analysis on lift rope breakage

	Investigation on computer burning

	Investigation on transformer fire

description:

When you hire Transglobe Interior, you are not just hiring a service provider. You are hiring a wealth of experience and a trusted friend. You are hiring someone who believes in executing his or her duties with pride and passion.

The project delivery process is a complicated one, at times even tenuous. This is why our values have shone a guiding light that grounds us to our roots throughout each and every project we have undertaken through the years. Each project is a unique one, and to be successful, needs to be treated with the attention it demands. From initial conceptualization and brainstorming to gathering and manufacturing materials, knocking down walls and erecting structures, and finally completing the polishing end touches, Transglobe Interior never wavers on its principles

Integrity is a big one, for it eases doubts and concerns for the client and assures him or her that they are getting the best they can get. The impression is key, too. With most things in life, we only get one chance to impress, and we build to impress. Innovation allows us to navigate through the project with agility and nimbleness, as we are able to capitalize on technology to provide project efficiency.

description:
East 9 Architects & Planners (E9AP) was established in 2004, providing full consultancy services for master planning, architecture design, interior design, and project management.

The firm is based in Singapore. The essence of the firm name draws from abstract existence of the energy from the rising sun, thereby with the symbolic number 9 uniting a team of dedicated professional architects, designers and managers.

E9AP's portfolio of works includes master planning, residential, commercial office, retail, institution, hotel, interior design, and graphic design. Projects are located in Singapore, Malaysia, and India.

Ms Betsy Lau Chuk Kwan (MSc City Planning, BArch, MSIA, AIA, RIBA) is the principal of the firm, having over 14 years in the practice of planning and architecture with experience on a wide range of projects. Betsy has worked in various cities including London, New York, Hong Kong and Singapore on different projects located in London, New York, Singapore, China, Taiwan, Malaysia, Indonesia, Myanmar, and India.

Betsy completed her studies in New York, USA and United Kingdom with Master of Science Degree in City Planning and Bachelor of Architecture Degree, graduating with the best student award. Betsy is a registered Architect in New York State, USA and Singapore. She is also a corporate member of American Institute of Architects (AIA), Singapore Institute of Architects (MSIA), and associate member of Royal Institute of British Architects (RIBA).

description:
As a specialist ground engineering services company, Interbore Pte. Ltd. operates within the Singapore and regional South East Asian markets as the provider of construction related expertise to the existing foundation engineering industry.

Interbore's approach to the challenging demands of foundation engineering in Singapore and the region is to provide a range of services to existing contractors on a consultancy and/or sub-contract basis in order to avoid direct competition to those organisations already well established in the market. These complimentary services can range from simple documentary review and comment to physical construction on site.

In striving toward this, the “complementary” approach offers the established industry a comprehensive range of highly specialised support facilities and services. 

Interbore has evolved into a team of dedicated, experienced professionals, who, rather than diluting the focus of their skills on the broader market, have pooled their individual expertise to very specific disciplines.

Interbore’s principal field of expertise and service is in the construction of underground retaining wall systems – specifically diaphragm walls. However, with the wealth of experience and proficiency of its staff, the service can be offered to other ground engineering disciplines such as alternative sub-surface retaining walls; for instance secant, contiguous, sheet, soldier and pipe pile walls, foundation piling, and foundation testing, ground improvement and anchoring.

The range of services that can be offered within these disciplines is infinitely variable and can be proposed as a single element or a variable combination dependant entirely on the Clients requirements.

description:
Brooklynz Stainless Steel Pte. Ltd is the leading stainless steel and metal work installation, fabrication and design experts based in Singapore. Brookylnz reinforced its position in the industry way back in the year 2012. Ever since its inception, it has grown leaps and bounds to be touted as the ‘SS Specialists’ in the country. Brookylnz stands out from the competitors and sets a foothold in the industry with its excellent designs, durability and product quality. Brookylnz strives to achieve perfection and is ever ready to go to any lengths to achieve perfection in quality, design, and service. 

Brookylnz is a specialized and organically grown stainless steel fabrication tier 1 company which complies with the ISO 9001:2015 specifications. The clientele base of Brooklynz span over leading builders, architects, interior designers and construction contractors in the country. Brookylnz has been awarded the ISO 9001:2015 and the OHSAS 18001:2007 certifications by the Occupational Health and Safety Management System on 23/10/2017.

Brookylnz always walks ahead hand in hand with the technological advancements and is well-equipped to meet the growing demands of the construction sector. Brooklynz aims to provide clients with solutions and products that achieve the exact atmosphere they desire. The unique attributes that make Brookylnz the number one choice when it comes to steel fabrication works are- durability, quality, innovative designs, low maintenance, and on-time delivery. 

Brooklynz stands tall with well-deserved awards and accolades like BizSafe Star Award, Singapore Enterprise Medal of Honour Award, and Singapore Business Federation - Prestige Class Award.

Brooklynz is headed over by a young and energetic entrepreneur, Kabir Hossain. He is the CEO of M/s.Brooklynz Stainless Steel Pte.Ltd ever since its inception in the year 2012. Recently, Brooklynz has started to spread its horizons over other countries too.

description:
The Excelco Group of Companies and its subsidiaries are leading specialists in the heavy foundation and construction equipment trading sectors.

In existence since 1988, this international private company continues to be a leader in the field of construction equipment.

For more than 30 years now, Excelco has been supporting the building of infrastructure and development efforts in Asia.

As a major distributor of a comprehensive range of products to the foundation and construction industry in the Asia Pacific and Oceanic Region, it contributes extensively to the economy of Singapore and the region through the importation and exportation of top-level machinery, technology, products and services.

It has also expanded its offices and workshops throughout the years of business to the Philippines, Malaysia, Thailand and Myanmar, on top of it’s global headquarters here in Singapore.

As a construction equipment specialist, it plays a crucial role in bridging the gap between the rigorous demands of contractors and the supply by manufacturers.

Through partnerships with manufacturers in Europe, Asia and America, Excelco continues to import top level machines, technology and products to aid the construction sector to grow in Singapore and Asia.

It supports construction companies both locally here in Singapore, and regionally with equipment, tools and expertise to build the future of Asia.

As a corporate, it is driven to become first class in it’s industry, innovative, design-thinking, entrepreneurial, diverse, sustainable, dynamic, evolutionary, purpose driven and environmentally conscious.

Excelco believes also in building a sustainable business that impacts, changes and adds value to society.

The company exists therefore to make a difference in every aspect of its business reach and it believes that in every business transaction, there is an opportunity to mutually learn, grow, create value and shape the future as it continues building for generations.

description:
Insects play a vital role in agriculture, aiding the pollination of crops so that they produce fruit and vegetables. CEA facilities typically conduct artificial pollination by hand, using fans, or even robotics to carry pollen flower to flower. We believe, and science tells us, that nature’s own method works best: insects.

Cuprina Pollination Services seeks to develop products and solutions that work with nature, not against it, to produce the best crop results for farmers and growers. Using proprietary technology, we are creating an integrated solution that will enable farmers to conduct on-demand insect pollination, from the release of insects when conditions are optimal, to monitoring pollination rates and finally recapturing insects when their work is done.

description:
IX Architects Pte Ltd (IXA) is a corporatized architectural practice registered with the Board of Architects, Singapore. IXA is also listed under the panel of Consultant for Public Sector projects with the Building and Construction Authority. From our humble beginnings in 2004, we are now a well-established and recognized regional architectural practice.

IX Architects Pte Ltd excels on providing professional architectural services with personalized, quality touches. IXA’s achievement of the International Standards Organization (ISO) – ISO9001 and ISO14001 accreditation in 2011 further cement our commitment to quality services. We strive to design and deliver high standard and creative works that are responsive to client’s needs and budget.

Over the years, IXA has been providing a wide range of architectural and design services of different building types and nature. Since inception, the firm has chalked up an impressive and diverse portfolio in the region of China, Vietnam, Cambodia and Myanmar. With firm regional exposure and experience in design consultancy and project management, IXA is poised to continue providing uncompromising quality design services in the region and beyond.

.

description:
The United Architects of the Philippines - Singapore Chapter is a society composed of active Filipino Architects and Designers working, practicing, and residing in Singapore, was formally Chartered by the UAP National Board under Board Resolution 0809-No.7-05 during the National Board meeting at UAP National Headquarters, Quezon City, Philippines on 15 July 2009. The Charter Certificate was signed and sealed by then UAP National Secretary Arch. Gil Evasco. 

The initiative of the UAP Singapore Chapter to seek legal standing in Singapore was done through the application to the Registry of Societies (ROS) on 18 October 2009, and was granted on 22 February 2011 with an official registration of UEN #T11SS0037C, making UAP Singapore Chapter the 1st recognized Foreign Architectural Organization by ROS. The organization is assigned under District B1 of the United Architects of the Philippines (UAP).


UAPS GENERAL OBJECTIVES
- To Establish Affiliation with International Organizations.
- To continually upgrade through the Continuing Professional Development & Program (CPD).
- To actively participate in the local & International Architecture events and in Socio-Cultural programs.
- To enlarge and strengthen the membership and promote a positive image of the Chapter.

PROFESSION
- To assert and sustain the primacy of the architecture profession and being responsive to the needs of the design and construction industry and its allied concerns.
 
PROFESSIONAL
- To uphold and safeguard the dignity and integrity of architects in achieving the highest level of professionalism.

PROFESSIONAL ORGANIZATION
- To be the moving force in galvanizing unity and harmony and effective leadership in the promotion of qualified, respected, globally prepared and competent architects.

PROFESSIONAL PRODUCT
- To serve as a progenitor in exercising standards and quality of services by providing opportunities for development and innovation to attain local and global recognition and exposure.

description:
Antara Koh Pte Ltd is a Specialist Contractor in Land and Marine Piling, Civil Engineering and Marine Structure Construction such as Jetty, Bridges and Harbour. Established in 1974 and over the years, we continuously improve our technology and company resources to handle large and difficult jobs which are technically demanding in Singapore and overseas markets.

We have completed Projects in Singapore and in the ASEAN region and extending to the Asia subcontinent and the UAE. We have registered offices in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia and Vietnam. We deliver Projects on time on budget with high quality and safety records.

Headquartered in Singapore, we own a yard of 2.2 hectares in the Industrial Town of Jurong with a private wharf with 165m of sea frontage. Within the property, we have 3,000m² of office space, 600m² of covered workshop and over 1.5 hectares of open yard for steel fabrication and precast concrete works.

We are innovative and highly mechanized. We design and build our own construction plant and equipment to suit our works to maximize productivity. We own and operate a wide range of construction equipment and plants such as fixed leader piling barges, Reverse Circulation Drills (RCD) and large diameter Down-The-Hole hammer (DTH); Our piling barges are equipped with Real Time Kinematic Global Positioning System (RTK GPS) and HYDROproTM software and are assisted by anchor handling work boats to change location quickly.

We established a creative working environment that will stimulate our employees to think on their own, discuss and consolidate ideas into an action plan with their colleagues. They will then organize themselves into a single-minded team to execute the works and do it right the first time, and every time.

description:
Having been in the industry since 2010, SaniQUO has bowled over customers not only with our affordable, trendy and durable product range but also because of our knowledgeable and dedicated staff. We are more than happy to provide wallet-friendly and fashion-forward suggestions to suit your preferences regardless of whether you are a brand new house owner or a seasoned house-hopper.

If you have been looking around for a bathtub, you would have come across the term “HDB Bathtub”. At SaniQUO, HDB bathtubs are our speciality. We offer customisable bathroom solutions that cater to most bathroom sizes; our smallest size available requires only about 80cm of space. Additionally, no hacking or renovation works are needed. It is the first ever ‘plug and play’ bathroom collection with pre-fitted water outlet system. In other words, no plumbing is required! It’s that convenient and fuss-free.

Hesitant about committing to the purchase of a bathtub off the rack? SaniQUO has got you covered. We genuinely pride ourselves on walking customers through the entire process to ensure the bathtub you select is perfect for you and your family. Since we also offer customisations on almost all our bathtubs (round tubs excluded), we will be able to alter the dimensions of the tub to fit into nooks and crannies even in odd-shaped bathrooms. This also allows for unsightly pipes to be covered up cleverly.

Another interesting feature available on our website is the ‘Mix and Match’ function. This aspect allows customers to ‘try out’ and match furnishings like basins and side cabinets before finally deciding on what looks best and then making their purchase. By choosing between the Hebe and Nature series, customers can see for themselves if they would prefer the ‘Hebe’ bathroom furnishings that are sleek, modern and Scandinavian-inspired or the ‘Nature’ series which injects warmth and cosiness through subtle wood elements.

Creating affordable luxury for your Bathroom.

description:
Exove Contracting Services Pte Ltd (Exove) is a contracting and erection services company that branched out from K.U.S Formwork & Scaffolding Pte Ltd. With over three years of experience in the industry, Exove provides value engineering services to its clients through better management of manpower resources and a focus on growing businesses. The company provides design, rental installation, dismantling, and modification services for a wide range of scaffolding and shoring systems.

As a subsidiary of the K.U.S Group of Companies, Exove benefits from the expertise of a highly experienced organization known for its versatility in providing concrete construction solutions and building supplies for various construction projects across Asia. Exove shares the same commitment to professionalism and customer satisfaction as its parent company, with a team of dedicated engineers who provide comprehensive, safe, and effective technical advice.

Exove is a competitive player in the industry, not only because of the quality of service it provides but also due to the cost-effective solutions it delivers. The company's scaffolding and shoring systems are installed by certified scaffold erectors under stringent supervision from qualified scaffold supervisors and certification from a Professional Engineer in accordance with the Workplace Safety and Health (Scaffolds) Regulations 2011, SS 659:2020 Code of Practice for Scaffolds, and other relevant regulations to ensure the highest safety standards in the industry.

Exove has a pool of experienced workers and supervisors who ensure the timely delivery of its solutions and services. With collaboration, teamwork, and effective management, Exove strives to provide the best customer experience by delivering quality scaffolding and shoring system solutions.

description:
Hoesch Bausysteme  is the leading manufacturer in the Roof and Wall Cladding Systems (building envelope) and Floor Systems.

The company started production in Germany in the 1960s and developed the first continuous production line of sandwich panels in the world in 1965.
Hoesch Bausysteme manufacture and supply metal sandwich systems and floor systems from Germany to worldwide.

Since March 2015, to expand our customer base and most importantly – to seek wider product acceptance in the S.E.A region, Hoesch Bausysteme set up a headquarter in Singapore located in German Centre to better serve this region.

Hoesch Bausysteme is officially registered in Singapore as "Hoesch Bausysteme Pte Ltd" in 2016.

description:
Unitrio, founded in 1973, is a leading supplier and distributor in the local building industry. In 1980s, the company gained its reputation by distributing a wide range of Armstrong vinyl tiles and mineral fibre ceilings, commonly used in retail outlets and offices. In 1985, the company became the sole-distributor for Artigo (Pirelli) rubber floorings.

 In 1990, Unitrio was the first company in Singapore to introduce acoustic heterogeneous vinyl floorcovering with the appointment of sole-distributor for Sommer, now known as Tarkett. Since then, the company has secured numerous prestige projects like the new K.K. Hospital, the Institute of Health building and the adjacent National Dental Centre. With the successful introduction of acoustic heterogeneous vinyl floorcovering, the health-care industry has, for the first time, been offered an alternative to the traditional homogeneous vinyl.

 Unitrio involvement with Access Floor System began in 1999. We understand that, as the industry moves towards an information technology based economy. We have to offer unique solution to meet these functional requirements of intelligent buildings. Thus the launch of our very own Unitech Access Floor System. Since then, we have completed many school projects and high-tech industry applications.

 Unitrio’s millennium milestones include exclusive distributorship for premium Korean-made Nox vinyl floors and Grabo contract and sports flooring. In 2011, Unitrio marketed the world’s first bacteria-killing vinyl floorcovering, Silver Knight.

 To date, Unitrio has supplied and installed more than 1,000,000 square metres of vinyl floorcovering and 100,000 square meters of Access Floors in Singapore. We also keep ready ex-stock of many flooring, ceiling and partition materials to meet your demands.

 With years of experience behind us, we have acquired the necessary knowledge and resources to assist you in all kinds of projects.

 At Unitrio, we take care of the products and the projects

description:
Land Design One is a landscape architectural practice established in Singapore and the Philippines to provide services locally as well as to all of Asia and surrounding regions. The firm brings together the internationally diverse experience of its partners as well as a skilled technical team to provide personal service and leading-edge design to a sophisticated clientele. 

We practice with the basic precepts of the landscape architecture profession as our foundation, including environmental stewardship, creation of livable communities, and cultivation of the natural link between people and the land. 

Working alongside architects, engineers, and planners, we refrain from imposing or repeating a signature style on projects, instead, aiming for a creative and unique solution to each assignment. Our designers respond to the individual site, client, and users, understanding that through its very nature as open space, at the end of the day the landscape knows no boundaries and is that part of the built environment experienced and shared by everyone. 

In Singapore, Land Design One Pte Ltd is a SILA Recognized Practice. In the Philippines, Land Design One Landscape Architecture Inc. is wholly owned by Filipino Landscape Architects, duly licensed by the Board of Landscape Architecture and current members of PALA.

description:
ARCHILAND is an international design and consulting company located in Singapore, Beijing, Tianjin and with a co-owned sister ofﬁce based in Copenhagen. ARCHILAND is currently made of almost 180 dedicated professionals from varying countries, cultures and professional background. Our approach is based on Smart Sustainable Design, and provides a one-stop service for urban planning, architectural and landscape design for local governments and private developers in Northern Europe, China and Asia Paciﬁc region.

Smart Sustainable Design focus on using our cross disciplinary team and approach using passive design and digital simulation methods ensuring the best balance and synergy in the varying layers of the urban design. we can combine the early stages service on project positioning, product research, urban planning, architectural, engineering optimization, energy efﬁciency innovation to the actual building level and cost control. From this unique approach we can deliver more value to our clients, to the project and to the community as a whole.

In recent years, with its rich integrated design project experience, ARCHILAND has won a large number of domestic and foreign design competitions, and its work has been widely published in international architecture and arts journals and Web media. Samaranch Memorial, Zhongbei Canal museum, Sino eco City , Nanjing green light house and Upon shared community have also been nominated for the World Architecture Festival. ARCHILAND maintains effective academic inter-action with the National University of Singapore, Portland State University and other well-known colleges to promote positive interaction between academic research and marketing practice. Strong academic background keeps ARCHILAND constantly improving on design concept and international experience, helps ARCHILAND establish an international communication and design platform and create a series of projects with international competitiveness.

It provides unlimited possibilities for tech innovators, system integrators, IoT developers, and even inventors to leverage upon and use this platform as the foundation for any new smart city innovation.

We continue to grow and welcome talented individuals who share our vision, working together to craft beautiful spaces that inspire and delight.

description:
The Company was incorporated in 1993, securing their first few projects in the facilities maintenance industry. Since its inception, the Company has been transformed from a humble team of few men team into a trusted name in the industry. Through commitment and teamwork, it has achieved recognition from the industry's regulator, Building & Construction Authority (BCA) and has been awarded with Grade A1 in General Building (CW01) since 2009. The Company is capable of undertaking large scale and complex projects in both the public and private sector.

In 2011, the Company ventured into property development. It achieved a significant milestone with the successful launch of its first private residential development of 422 units of luxurious condominium Skies Miltonia, semi-detached houses at Wak Hassan and a freehold B1 industrial property, Tag A at 81 Tagore lane.

The latest completed developments by the Company include a hotel development at 700 Beach Road, a hotel with retail/F&B mall at 86 East Coast Road and The Amore Executive Condominium at Punggol.

With the Company’s proven track records and experience, it is poised to undertake more challenging projects and future growth ahead.

description:
Progressive Builders Pte Ltd was incorporated in Singapore in January 1973. The company started as a precast concrete manufacturer and later expanded into general building construction.

Progressive has undertaken and successfully completed numerous projects including both public and private housing projects, industrial projects, commercial and institutional projects.

In recent years, the company concentrated and developed core competencies in public housing projects in Singapore.  The company has professionals specializing in the project management, general building construction services as well as design and build services for fast track projects.

The company also operates an in-house Steel Fabrication facility and runs an overseas skilled workers testing centre in Dhaka, Bangladesh.  This overseas testing centre is accredited by Building Control Authority of Singapore.

Progressive Builders is presently registered with the Building and Construction Authority (BCA) under the work head in General Building (CW01), A1 category.

description:

In fact everywhere is part of some ‘landscape’, because our visual world has no boundaries, 

This is why we are Landscape Architects, to influence and shape for better all the places we live. And as important, the places we don’t inhabit but depend on for our existence; clean air, fresh water and food. Places that sustain the rich diversity of life. Check out our website [www.icn-design.com.sg] and you’ll find projects we’ve completed. Advocating, promoting, and achieving a range of design interventions creating places that we know make people’s experience and life much better. We’re determined to move the needle toward a greener, more resilient planet.

description:

description:
Who We Are

Our Mission
To optimise energy usage and contribute positively to environmentally-regenerative growth at the corporate and national levels, for the benefit of current and future generations

Our Vision
To deliver smart energy solutions for an environmentally-regenerative future

Our Values
1) Integrity
2) Teamwork
3) Innovation
4) Excellence

Measurement & Verification (M&V) Pte Ltd is an established Energy Services Company (ESCO) accredited by the National Environment Agency (NEA) of Singapore. Our staff strength stands at more than 70, and we are growing rapidly.

In every case that we are assigned, energy effective solutions are discovered by our team of technical professionals – without sacrificing comfort, convenience or productivity and yet, resulting in optimal energy savings – savings that go straight to your bottom line!

We have a proven track record in saving energy costs by up to 30 per cent and offering return on investment of up to 50 per cent. We manage more than 130,000 refrigeration tons of installed air-conditioning capacity for data centres, semiconductor factories, airport terminals, hotels, shopping malls, and office buildings in Singapore.

Our energy solutions have also been deployed in various locations throughout Asia, including Malaysia and Myanmar. We have conducted comprehensive energy audits for clients in China, India and the Philippines as well.

We provide the following services:
1) Energy performance contracting
2) Energy efficiency performance-based facility management
3) Facility Energy Efficiency Management System (EEMS)
4) Energy audits
5) Energy efficiency design and consultancy
6) Supply and install high precision instruments such as temperature sensors, water and air flow meters, power meters, air and water pressure sensors, humidity sensors, CO2 sensors, refrigerant leak detectors, data loggers and more

description:
Heavy Lifts and Haulage sits at the core of the Pollisum fleet so no matter what your lifting or purchase requirements are, we have the product for you. With crawler cranes, all-terrain mobile cranes, rough terrain cranes, lorry cranes and prime movers with trailers from respected manufacturers, you can be sure you’ll be hiring extremely capable machinery. 

Pollisum manufactures concrete and sand buckets as well as any other customised equipments which come in various standard and customizable sizes. All our fabricated products are manufactured according to PE certified drawing and can be supplied with PE test at clients’ option. 

Over the years, Pollisum has also built up a reputation as a company supplying top quality steel structure fabrication for Marine and Offshore projects, as well as Commercial and Residential Construction Industries. 

Additionally, Pollisum is honoured to be one of the few companies that are approved by Ministry of Manpower to execute structural repair in Singapore including repair and manufacture of lattice booms, telescopic booms and jibs, as well as repair and overhaul of crawler cranes, telescopic cranes, aerial work platforms and forklift trucks.

Our safety culture is renowned throughout the industry and is at the forefront of Building & Construction Authority (BCA) compliance requirement as evidenced by our externally verified industry accreditation for ISO9001 for Quality, OHSAS 18001 and BizSafe Star for Occupational Health.

description:
Vision Building Forensics (VBF) | Building Surveying & Forensic Consultancy | Singapore

Founded in 2003, Vision Building Forensics (VBF) was built on a simple belief: every building issue has a solution — and the right solution starts with expertise, integrity, and care.

From humble beginnings as a specialist in water seepage investigations for private homes, we've grown into a trusted leader in Singapore’s building surveying and forensic consultancy space. Today, we serve a diverse range of properties — from residential and commercial to industrial and institutional buildings — helping clients uncover, understand, and resolve building challenges.

At VBF, we’re not just technical experts. We’re problem-solvers, collaborators, and trusted advisors to those who care deeply about the buildings they own, manage, or live in.

 We take pride in our people-first culture — where continuous learning, mutual respect, and purpose-driven work go hand in hand.

If you’re passionate about making buildings safer, stronger, and smarter — we’d love to connect.

description:
We are RILICO - Crafting tomorrow’s sustainability today.
At RILICO, we've been crafting plywood for over 44 years, merging impeccable quality with cutting-edge technology.Our commitment to sustainability drives every step of our manufacturing process, empowering construction efficiency through our products, while catalyzing transformative change in formwork technology, one project at a time.

Each RILICO plywood piece represents a marriage of artistry and science, backed by a legacy of quality that spans generations. With a global presence, we connect cultures, inspire creations, and transform industry practices, proving that sustainability and excellence go hand-in-hand. We are RILICO - Crafting tomorrow’s sustainability today.

RILICO MEANS

description:
JGP Architecture (S) Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based award-winning architectural practice established in 1985. The firm has offices in Shanghai, Beijing, Ho Chi Minh City, Kuala Lumpur and Yangon, providing comprehensive architectural consultancy and project management services.

JGP’s built work includes a diverse mix of Asia-Pacific projects, ranging from residential and commercial, to infrastructural and industrial. In recent years, the firm has undertaken ambitious projects including masterplanning commissions and healthcare developments. Some of the firm’s notable recent built projects include the award-winning Harbour Mall & Four Points by Sheraton (Sandakan, Sabah, Malaysia), the Holiday Inn Express Singapore, and several masterplanning commissions in Zhuhai (Guangdong province, China). In 2014, JGP received the coveted SME One Asia Award, in recognition of outstanding business excellence, innovation, fair practices and growth in entrepreneurship.

JGP’s philosophy is to provide design excellence for clients. To achieve this, the firm is committed to foster a collaborative environment underpinning every project. One that is built on teamwork, trust and credibility, mutual respect and understanding, and principles of work ethics and professionalism. JGP believes that the environment promotes a culture for pursuits in pushing design limits and integrating multifaceted insights.

In the face of today’s challenges brought about by market volatility, social and geopolitical complexities, environmental concerns, and the ever-changing demands of society, JGP seeks to continuously evolve and find innovative ways to designing. Ultimately, the goal is to lead the way for bettering our built environment and the lives of the people.

description:
LCH Quantity Surveying Consultant was founded in September 1986 by Mr Lee Choong Hiong.

LCH provides traditional quantity surveying services and has managed contracts across all market segments; Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Institutional and Overseas. LCH emerged stronger in our field through the continued support from our clients and a team of dedicated employees.

Today, LCH Quantity Surveying Consultant is known as LCH Quantity Surveying Pte Ltd and appointed Ms Natalie Yong as its Managing Director. She is poised to bring LCH to meet the changing environment in the construction industry and believes that the role of a Quantity Surveyor has to widen in order to bring value to the Client and addressing the unmet needs in the new markets. She has since expanded with two oversea offices in Seoul, Korea and Dili, Timor Leste.

In 2021, LCH Quantity Surveying announced the merger with JIA Quantity Surveyors & Project Managers Pte Ltd, creating one of Singapore’s largest home-grown independent Quantity Surveying firm.

Combined, the companies have managed more than 580 building and infrastructure projects with a total accumulated project value in excess of $14 billion. As the pioneers and two of the home-grown established firms in the Quantity Surveying industry, the merger aims to elevate the professionalism and recognition of Quantity Surveyors while providing clients with excellent service through a broader knowledge and resource base.

We remain to be one of the few independent quantity surveying firms in Singapore that is owned by its founder.

Our locations: 
| Singapore | Seoul, Korea | Timor Leste |

description:
Ong Teng Chong Building Contractor (OTC) is a trusted name in the construction & fit-out industry, with six decades of experience in Singapore. The company has played a vital role in shaping the nation’s built environment through projects that emphasize functionality, efficiency, and design excellence—striving to be a trusted partner by delivering innovative, sustainable solutions that stand the test of time.

Originally focused on infrastructure, the firm has evolved into a full-service design & build company, offering consultancy, value engineering, MEP works, maintenance, and interior fit-outs. Its portfolio includes residential, commercial, industrial & complex, high-security projects for Singapore’s defence sector—such as blast-proof structures and specialized facilities.

Our major repeat clients include government & Defense, Blue-Chip Corporate and Institutional. 

Projects Highlights: 
-The Great Eastern Centre (SGD 20M): Major interior fitting-out works across multiple levels, lobbies, and facilities for a prestigious commercial client.
-ST Engineering Facilities & Defence Science & Technology Agency (Multiple Projects): A long-standing relationship involving numerous A&A works, warehouse upgrades, and facility modifications at various locations. This demonstrates an ability to work within live, high-security industrial plants.
- Circle Line MRT (Bartley Station): Civil works for a major public transport infrastructure project.
-Roof Repairs and Waterproofing at Transit Road (SGD 2.7M)
-Design, supply, installation, testing, and commissioning of Fire Alarm & Detection Systems, FM200 Clean Agent Suppression Systems, and fire-rated constructions.
-2-Storey Residential Detached Landed Bungalow, Merryn Road (SGD 3.5M)

Partner with OTC for seamless project delivery and complex construction success. We transform challenges into achievements, building a future where innovation meets unwavering reliability.

description:
iNPQS Pte Ltd was jointly set up by Singapore Institute of Architects (SIA), Institute of Engineers (IES) and Association of Consulting Engineers (ACES) to improve productivity in the building industry through Information Communication Technology (ICT) and Building Information Modelling (BIM) technology.

The business plan outlines the development of a digital platform, an intelligent National Productivity Specification platform, to integrate professionals and industry players in building construction.

iNPQS, together with the strong support from built industry users and agencies, has developed a National Specification known as the iCoreSpecs. 

iNPQS offers a digital platform to assist designers create specifications that are clear and unambiguous. The solution harnesses Information Communication Technology (ICT)/Building Information Modelling (BIM) technology in a highly productive manner. 

Other users in the whole construction value chain e.g. developers, contractors, sub-contractors, suppliers, etc. will now be able to collaborate as a project team. These capabilities will create greater effectiveness and efficiency in the procurement and construction process. As this platform can be used right across the project cycle, there will be significant productivity gains

description:
-Force, The Multinational Post Tensioning Company.

E-Force Engineering Pte Ltd commenced its operation in early 2006 as a specialist company in Singapore to carry out post-tensioning works for both building and civil works. Our clients in Singapore include reputable multinational companies such as Shimizu Corporation, China Construction, Boustead and Lend Lease.

E-Force philosophy is always forward looking and in 2007, a new branch was opened in U.A.E primarily to provide design, supply & installation of post-tensioning works for buildings. We secured works on the biggest mall (Safeer Mall) and the biggest Mosque (Sheikh Zayed Islamic Centre) in Fujairah as well as the largest resort development (Mina Al Fajer) in Dibba. In 2009, our Technical Center in Vietnam was officially registered to further strengthen our technical capabilities. In 2011, our JV partnership with Ansaq in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia started work for Al Hussain Tower in the prominent Olaya area in Riyadh. 
E-Force post tensioning systems conform to the requirements of international standards such as stan-dard acceptant of PTI and BS EN 13391:2004. Eforce post tensioning systems has been approved for use by government departments, local authorities, engineering consultancies, multinational construction companies and organizations.
E-Force management consists of a strong team of managers and collectively the team has over 40 years of post-tension experience. With a professional and experience team in the construction industry, E-Force is committed to deliver high quality products and reliable services

description:
We are an award-winning integrative architecture firm based in Singapore focused on transforming the built environment into more liveable, beautiful, and sustainable spaces. Committed to interdisciplinary thinking, our designers consist of architects, landscape architects, urban planners, engineers, and artists. Our most famous projects include Singapore's impressive Changi Airport T3, the ParkRoyal-at-Pickering Hotel in Chinatown, the Banyan Tree hotel in Lijiang (China), and the iconic Marina Barrage. We have also designed the world's largest green wall at the Ocean Financial Center in Singapore. Our projects are based in over 13 countries, largely across Asia, and work within a range of typologies, including residential, commercial, hospitality and institutional projects. 

If you are interested in hiring us, collaborating with us or generally a position with us, let us know! We are always looking for outstanding staff, clients and collaborators. We also have a robust intern program. Drop us a line if you are interested at design@tierra.com.sg. Look forward to hearing from you!

**PODesign (POD) is a sister company to Tierra Design. While Tierra Design is renowned for its landscape designs, POD heads up all architecture and interior design projects.**

description:

The company also provides “one-stop” services for Professional Engineering Services. Engineers 9000 could support EPC contractors in their execution of project in Singapore.  We could also value-add by creating cost effective and safe designs.

Engineers 9000 is ISO 9001:2015, ISO 14001:2015 and bizSAFE Level 3 certified.

description:
JAB Consulting Pte Ltd, a Singapore based construction contract consultant that was originally established in May 2001 and has since obtained considerable experience and a reputable name in providing commercial and contractual services to the Singapore construction industry and within the region. 

JAB Consulting has worked for both International and Local Contractors on prestigious projects including the Thomson East Coast Line MRT, Downtown Line MRT, Circle Line MRT, North East Line MRT, Deep Tunnel Sewerage System (DTSS), Changi Airport Terminals 3 and 4, Dubai Airport Expansion, Dubai Airport People Mover System. 

JAB Consulting provides efficient professional services within the designated and agreed time frames, at an attractive price and to our Clients’ complete satisfaction as demonstrated by the repeat business that the company has regularly been awarded in recognition of the services performed. 

JAB Consulting has permanent offices in Singapore and employs only professionally qualified staff with sufficient experience in all aspects of Tunnelling, Civil & Building Works, Communications, Electrical and Mechanical Services, and Signalling Systems and whom are capable of working on major infrastructure projects providing comprehensive services, including:

- Contract Management
- Commercial Management
- Quantity Surveying
- Scheduling and Planning
- Claims Preparation, Negotiation and Resolution
- Expert Witness / Arbitration

JAB Consulting aims to provide a high quality service offering commercial and contractual advice that fully meets our Clients’ requirements by providing a fully professional service. The company fee structure is flexible to meet the various requirements and, most importantly, based on the results we can obtain our service represents excellent value for money.

description:
Kienta is a construction company committed to delivering exceptional quality and value to our clients. With half a century of proven success, we have established ourselves as a trusted partner in the construction industry – recognised for our expertise, reliability, and unwavering dedication to excellence.

Founded in 1975 by Chairman Mr. Goh Kian Tiong, Kienta began with a strong foundation in Housing & Development Board (HDB) flats, as well as commercial, private, and institutional projects. Over time, the company carved a solid reputation for quality, professionalism, and trustworthiness.

As Kienta grew, we nurtured a team of skilled in-house technical professionals who work closely with consultant partners to secure and deliver projects – particularly Design & Build developments. Our teams oversee every stage, from conceptual design to commissioning, gaining extensive technical expertise and hands-on experience in complex project environments.

One of our key areas of expertise lies in Data Centre construction, spanning both greenfield and brownfield projects. These facilities demand meticulous planning, advanced technology, and precise execution to ensure reliability, security, and scalability. Our technical teams are deeply experienced and committed to delivering these critical projects with excellence.

Today, Kienta continues to evolve and expand its engineering capabilities. Our diverse portfolio encompasses Data Centres, Hospitality and Resorts, Telecommunications, Healthcare, Biomedical, Defence, and HDB BTO and upgrading projects – many of which have earned prestigious awards in the construction industry.

Above all, Kienta remains steadfast in its commitment to excellence – delivering every project with professionalism, precision, and punctuality, even under the most stringent conditions.

description:
Compared with conventional methods, StiFlex is quicker and easier to install, providing savings in time and manpower without compromising on any expected relevant conformances. 

StiFlex modular system comprises a range of steel profile sizes and connector, designed to stiffen and strengthen both internal and external walls, for all masonry types including lightweight concrete, cement or clay and in any form, whether in blocks or panels. Similarly, StiFlex system stiffens and strengthens drywalls made from gypsum or calcium silicate boards.

As a fully integrable system, StiFlex profile length adaptability eliminates material waste; modular connector-tie adjustability shortens installation time and its lightweight, user friendly system reduces fatigue with simplicity of only one tradesman type workforce, dispensing any co-ordination.

Besides benefitting users on site, StiFlex minimizes administrative work by deploying its design and plot software (for calculations and drawings) that expediently translates the same useful data for the convenience of client’s purchasing and cost control.

Total solution includes supply of expanded mesh, purpose-designed StiFlex lath, for enhanced plaster crack-control, strengthening the plaster on StiFlex profiles. Usage instructions are found in StiFlex plastering method statements in StiFlex literature.

As a direct replacement to conventional reinforced concrete stiffeners, StiFlex is continually tested &/or assessed, compliant to the required conforming safe design standards (national/regional) for wall construction, namely designed wall spans (matching or surpassing concrete stiffeners), load bearing and non-load bearing fire resistance ratings (satisfying requirements up to 4 hours), sound insulation (meeting or exceeding expected transmission class) and thermal insulation (better with lower condensation and conductance values for energy savings).

description:
Noise Plaster: Revolutionizing Soundproof Windows and Doors!

As urban noise levels rise, Noise Plaster has emerged as an award-winning brand dedicated to tackling noise concerns. We specialize in designing, fabricating, and installing soundproof windows and doors, offering premium solutions for a tranquil environment.

Setting ourselves apart from regular windows and doors, our soundproofing approach incorporates top-quality materials and precise craftsmanship. We meticulously curate materials from reputable European suppliers to ensure the highest standards of effectiveness. With an in-house team of skilled professionals, we employ specialized techniques for optimal acoustic isolation, solar heat rejection, and weatherproofing.

Our commitment to excellence has propelled us to become one of the fastest-growing window and door companies. Having soundproofed over 1800 households in a short span, Noise Plaster Group is leading the industry's transformation. We prioritize education on the significance of premium quality windows, making them accessible to all.

Operating three state-of-the-art factories spanning over 25,000 sqft in Singapore and Malaysia, we leverage cutting-edge technology and machinery to deliver superior products. Our diverse range of brands caters to varied needs and preferences, offering customers a wide selection of options.

Join us at Noise Plaster as we revolutionize the window and door industry. Experience unrivaled soundproofing solutions, elevated standards, and exceptional customer satisfaction.

description:
Established in 1981, Ang Tong Seng Brothers Enterprises Pte Ltd (“ATS”), operates primarily in Singapore and provides civil engineering services including earthwork, roadwork, drainage work, basement work, structural works involving demolition and underground infrastructure as well as other general building works. 

Registered with the Building and Construction Authority of Singapore, ATS is currently classified under Grade C3 for the General Building Category and Grade B1 for the Civil Engineering category. 

In 2018, Ang Tong Seng Construction (“ATSC”) was established to grow our suite of services through the wholesaling and leasing of construction-related machinery, equipment, materials, and supplies.

Through Ang Tong Seng Holdings Pte. Ltd., both ATS and ATSC are wholly-owned subsidiaries under the engineering and construction segment of Ocean Sky International Limited, a SGX Catalist-listed construction and property firm. 

We commit ourselves wholeheartedly to the projects we undertake, and firmly believe that our responsive, high-quality and timely suite of services give us the cutting edge within our industry. Our ability to provide competitive solutions that exceed the needs and expectations of our clients stands testament to the robust and comprehensive skills and expertise of our staff. 

Our growing team of 190 staff perform diverse roles and responsibilities with the highest level of professionalism and commit towards safe and timely completion of every project. 

We have received numerous accreditations from relevant bodies for our quality and safety management, as well as for our care for the environment. 

We are dedicated to the on-time and on-budget completion of the projects we commit to and strive to continue strengthening our capabilities to meet the needs of our clients. 

For more information on Ocean Sky International Limited, please visit: https://oceanskyintl.com

- Virtual showrooms - Drive product discovery and sales.

description:
Yuan Ji Enterprises Pte Ltd (YJE), founded in 1994, specialises in underground utilities infrastructure works across Singapore. The company’s core competencies include pipe laying, cable installation for both electricity transmission and distribution networks, horizontal directional drilling (HDD), telecommunication cabling, and road reinstatement projects.

Over the years, YJE has delivered numerous projects for clients such as Singapore Cable Vision (SCV), Singtel, StarHub, PUB, M1, and Singapore Power, contributing to the construction of essential utility networks. These works span the installation, testing, and commissioning of power and telecommunication cables, underground pipeline networks, and related infrastructure.

YJE is also experienced in supporting advanced services such as 3D pipeline mapping using gyrometric systems, scaffold works, and comprehensive utility installation services, always with a focus on safety, efficiency, and quality delivery.

description:
The cicada has long captured the imagination of ancient civilisations, regarded as an emblem of immortality and renewal due to its four-year subterranean larval stage, and inspiring art and poetry in its stunning adult form.

Since it was founded in Singapore in 1993, Cicada has evolved into one of Asia’s leading landscape architects, whose continual cycle of reflection and rebirth produce inspiring designs that are unique and relevant to their time. Founders Casey Gan and Lim Swe Ting bring a partnership of exceptional talents to each project, combining strong design concepts with an innate sense of form and lyricism. The result is an impressive collection of works that display a harmony of originality, sensitivity and skill.

Rather than deferring to a particular style or design language, Cicada’s designs are an intuitive response to the project site and local ecology, grounded in a commitment to sustainability. Through a precise understanding of space and proportion, and clarity of structure, Cicada seeks to make sense of space within its unique environmental and cultural contexts, articulating the inherent site experience and improving the quality of the relationship between people and their surroundings.

Cicada’s repertoire of local and international projects spans residential, institutional, commercial, resorts and master planning of diverse scale and complexity. In recognition of design excellence and technical accomplishments, Cicada has been the recipient of multiple awards.

 
2015
BCA Construction Excellence Award 2015
The Metropolis
 

2015 – 14

Gold Award – Emerald Riverside
 

2014
BCA Construction Excellence Award 2014
W Singapore Sentosa Cove

2009
President's Design Award 2009
Design of The Year – The Met
 

2007
President's Design Award 2007
Designer of The Year

company_name: KBE AIR CONDITIONING  & ENGINEERING PTE LTD
description:
KBE (Kang’s Brothers Electrical) was established in 1978, starting off as a supplier of only air conditioning services, repairs, installation and aircon maintenance in Singapore. KBE served both commercial and residential clients. In 2006, The Company carried out an expansion exercise, providing Interior Design with its air conditioning expertise.

Due to evolving business objectives, Kang’s Brother Electrical has advanced a long way from a humble Air Conditioning services company and has today become a cross border company providing a wide range of services, such as cold room and refrigeration systems, installation of split units, VRV, marine air conditioning & electrical wiring, air ducting work and mechanical ventilation. KBE ultimate goal is to help home and office owners achieve cooler and cleaner air hence the slogan – “Spreading Coolness Everywhere”, a promise that has been well kept even until today.

OUR MISSION
KBE’s mission is to provide the finest as well as the most professional services to Homes and Offices. KBE combines quality services with by highly trained and certified technicians, all at affordable rates. Our promise is to provide unconditional high quality standards and remain credible to our clients, ensuring your home or office remains comfortable and cool.

OUR SERVICES
Through knowledge and expertise from years in the Air Conditioning Industry, KBE retains the trust of many regular customers from all aspects of society. From homeowners to large corporations, KBE is a trusted partner in handling their air conditioning needs.

Our Core Services comprises of Air conditioner installation and aircon maintenance in Singapore, Ducting design for optimum expulsion of air pollution, Kitchen exhaust installation and maintenance along with other ventilation related services that your home or office might require. We provide services in a variety of packages. Our AC packages range from your standard ad-hoc servicing up to yearly packages. We maintain each of your units regularly to ensure your system is running flawlessly, all at one price. In order to view a more comprehensive list of our services, please visit our service page.

OUR ACHIEVEMENTS AND MILESTONES
BEI ASIA AWARDS 2017
SUCCESSFUL ENTREPRENEUR IN SINGAPORE 2010 
SME 1 ASIA AWARDS 2011 
SINGAPORE BRAND AWARDS 2011
SINGAPORE CIRCLE OF EXCELLENCE 2012

OUR RECOGNITION AND AWARDS
BIZSAFE-ENTERPRISE-LEVEL-3
BCA (BUILDING AND CONSTRUCTION AUTHORITY) REGISTERED COMPANY

description:
FABRIGLASS CONSTRUCTION PTE LTD is a striving company in the design, manufacture, supply, installation and maintenance of architectural glass and aluminium in the construction industry with a paid up capital of S$450,000. We have also ventured into structural and superstructure works that covers rebar formworks and structural steel works for MRT projects. With our main office in Singapore, and our support and manufacturing plant in China and Dubai, we provide our clients with a wide range of glass products, services and solutions. Fabriglass Construction continues to be a strong and dependable partner highly responsive to customer requirements. Our versatility makes us a one-stop solution for all your construction and industrial glass needs.

In our efforts to continuously raise the industry bar, we seek to introduce innovative new building solutions and broaden our skills through strategic joint-venture partnerships with overseas counterparts. This has seen us emerge in recent years from being a principal player in the building of private residential and commercial developments, to becoming a leader too in large-scale civil engineering works, cementing our position at the forefront of the construction industry, locally and regionally.

VISION 

To be the leader in  the Asia Pacific region for design, manufacture, supply, installation and maintenance of building glass material with quality, prompt service and pricing as our forte

MISSION STATEMENT 

As a construction firm, we are dedicated to our customers to handle any projects in the most professional way to deliver on time and on budget with good after sales service support and warranty. To ensure the highest quality and standards in every job undertaken and to ensure the highest safety standards and practices to be carried out on every construction project undertaken by the company.

description:
INTERNATIONAL DESIGN STUDIO PTE LTD

Overview
International Design Studio (IDS) is a Singapore architecture firm which delivers award-winning design solutions for projects in South East Asia, Middle East, South Asia, Africa and Singapore. IDS started out as a boutique studio dedicated to the creation of new paradigms for sustainable and iconic developments. The firm has undertaken prestigious projects for residential, commercial, hospitality and institutional buildings in Asia and the Middle East region.
 
The office was founded by the late Dr Timothy Seow, who is still one of the most well-known pioneer generation architects in Singapore. Currently, the office is lead by Ho Lih Liang and Henry Lagansua, both are mentored by Dr Seow for more than 20 years. 

IDS believes that the first step to achieving architectural excellence is by understanding the clients’ needs; Our approach to architecture is a simple but effective combination of  programmatic analysis, strong contextual response, being environmentally friendly and creating a product that will make life good. Armed with this philosophy, IDS continues to strengthen their relationship with our clients whilst striving to deliver high-level creative services.

Providing Creative and Sustainable Solutions
In a world of constant global change and technological advances that affect all aspects of people’s lives, IDS showcases how they can deliver architectural excellence by adapting to these changes. Teamwork and passion to deliver good architecture is the driving force behind IDS, where the creative flair and hard work of every team member has spurred the firm to achieve prominence and distinction in the building industry. The team members not only work closely with one another but also with our clients, to deliver a best design solution for every project.

description:

Our specializations are in Raised Access Floor Systems and Electrical Control Components.

- Consultancy

Our range of Maruyasu Components includes:

- Terminal Blocks
