description:
New Space Architects was established in 2003. New Space Architects believes in breaking new design paradigms, being client-oriented and delivering value with quality. The practice has a strong team whose collective skills seek to achieve maximum functionality without compromising on aesthetics and design. The firm takes on a selective number of jobs yearly to ensure personal attention and adequate resources are dedicated to each project and client. 

The Practice has built up a varied portfolio of mixed developments in Singapore, China, and the region. They include private housing, commercial and institutional buildings, hotels and resorts, as well as urban design and masterplanning for townships. The company has completed major projects such as the Pullman Resort in Sanya, China, which was awarded Landmark Hotel Status by CIA), the IBP Office Park in Singapore, as well as various housing and mixed-use projects ranging in size from single family dwelling to large townships. 

New Space has received SS ISO 9001:2000 certification in 2008 in recognition of Quality management for Architectural Practice, and ISO14001:2004 certification in 2012 for its commitment to environmental responsibility. 

Since its inception in 2003, the firm has won numerous awards, such as the President’s Design Award in 2015, Bloomberg Asia Property Awards (Best Office Building), the Platinum CONQUAS Award for Shelford Suites in Singapore, the Assisi Hospice project in Singapore. It was also shortlisted in the World Architecture Festival in 2012, 2013 and 2015.

description:
INTRODUCTION
MU Architects is a registered Architectural Practice based in Singapore. It is licensed by the Board of Architects (BOA) to practice Architecture in Singapore. MU Architects seeks to provide full fledge Architectural Consultancy and Services for all its clientele.

MU Architects is lead by Principal Architect Matthew Lai

FOCUS & EXPERIENCE
MU Architects has diverse experience with residential Architecture and Interiors for both private and corporate clients. Aside from local Singapore based projects, MU Architects is also working on projects in Malaysia. 

MU Architects is also keenly interested in architectural exploration via its participation in numerous architectural competitions local and overseas. 

DESIGN MANIFESTO
MU Architects uses clever and innovative architectural designs to address issues of Identity, Community and Place in an increasingly homogenous contemporary environment. 

We provide full professional Architectural consultancy services. Our services include architectural planning, design, authority submissions, tender drawings, building specifications, tender, project and contract administration. 

We believe in a holistic design vision for each and every project. As such, we wish to be involved from the Architectural design, through to the Interior and landscape design of the buildings that we help create.

description:
Newsoil Technologies Pte Ltd (NST) is a Singapore founded company and is a subsidiary of Boldtek Holdings Limited, which has a track record of more than 30 years in Singapore's construction business. Boldtek's subsidiary companies also include an A1 contractor firm, interior design, precast and development facilities. 

NST was incorporated in 2014 as a soil research facility that primarily engages in green construction and treatment of soft clay. NST mainly engages in sustainable soil research and conversion of marine clay into engineered soil which is suitable for various coastal and non-structural construction works. 

In 2017, NST had been granted a Patent Act for "Method of Granulation of Marine Clay by Extrusion, Chemical and Physical Treatment to Produce Engineered Soil".

description:
JLFC Pte Ltd is a homegrown company in Singapore that designs and supplies high-quality building products to Asia Pacific region.
With more than 20 years of experience, our team always provide reliable & workable Lifting, Fixing, Connecting and Sealing solutions for our customers. 
Besides our in-house brand, JLFC also represents reputable brands from Germany, China, Japan and Finland.
As ISO9001 certified company, all our products go through regular testing in Singapore Accredited Laboratories based on project requirements and relevant codes to uphold the highest quality standards. 
JLFC has a wide range of projects under Housing Development Board, Land Transport Authority, Public Utility Board, Ministry of Health, Ministry of Education, Singapore Civil Defence Force, National Environment Agency, Jurong Town Corporation and private condominiums, factories, data centres, commercial buildings etc.

Our Vision    : “J” - Leading brand in Future Connections.

Our Mission  : To create value through management. 
		       To cooperate with companies that lead the future. 
		       To serve customers through BAO system. 
		       To continue innovating and developing.

Our Values : Customer First.
		    Recruiting Talents. 
		    Making Progress Every Day.

Our Product Range	:
1) Lifting Anchor System for Precast Elements
2) Mechanical Connecting System for Precast Elements
3) Grout Sleeves for Rebar Connections between Precast Columns and Beams
4) Anchor Channels for Curtain Walls, Precast Facades and M&E Fixings
5) Magnetic Solutions for Formwork & Other Fixings
6) Rebar Processing Equipment and Rebar Threading Machines & Couplers
7) Sealing System for Water Resistance
8) Cast-in Sockets, Metal & Ceramic Inserts, Corrugated Pipes, Bolts & Nuts
9) Shear Studs and Equipment for Steel Structure
10) Customized Products on Request

description:
Nova Buildings Group is a manufacturer of structural steel and a regional solutions provider for precision pre-engineered buildings and pre-fabricated building designs. The Group is set up with a Singapore headquarters, a regional manufacturing hub and engineering centre in Vietnam, and a presence in key cities of Indonesia, Malaysia, Thailand and Vietnam. 

Our vision is to deliver the Nova Difference by understanding our customers’ needs comprehensively and creating a positive and personal experience that impacts their work lives. We work towards our vision by adopting a Nova Mindset – to approach a problem innovatively with the aim to bring a positive transformation to our customer experience.

Nova Buildings aims to bring sustainable and innovative solutions to companies that require answers to contemporary challenges. Our strong connections in the industry enable us to collaborate with diverse suppliers and services providers in the building and construction ecosystem, to bring specialized and cost-effective solutions to our customers.

Quality goes beyond the solutions we deliver into the relationships we cultivate within this region. By developing quality relationships, we provide the gateway and ease of access to a host of reputable solutions and services on local ground, with the aim to improve your experience and make your project delivery as seamless as possible.

The company values consistency and commitment in all aspects of the business, from dependable quality and design integrity to accountability to our customers. We do not compromise on our business standards and work ethics as we deliver on our promises.

Leveraging on our lean outfit, Nova Buildings responds to needs of customers with agility and is nimble in resolving issues on the ground during delivery. A humble setup also means we are actively pursuing efficiencies and channel collaboration through the advent of technology.

In Nova, passion speaks loudest and action echoes commitment.

description:
AWP Pte Ltd, founded as Alfred Wong Partnership in 1957 by the first SIA Gold Medalist continues to develop its approach of `Modernity and Methodology’, in its contemporary commissions and design competitions.

description:
Our Company

Started in 1954 as a simple builder for Building and Civil Construction, Guan Ho Construction Co (Pte) Ltd has developed, from strength to strength, to a BCA (Building and Construction Authority) registered A1 General Building Contractor. 

Our achievement lies in our willingness to collaborate with all our stakeholders, the relentless pursuit of innovative engineering and construction excellence, and our diligent and dedicated team of construction and support professionals.

In response to the rapid changing environment and challenges in the construction industry, we have devoted to people and technologies development. In addition to the use of Virtual Building Information Modelling (BIM), we have adopted Prefabricated Ore-finished Volumetric Construction (PPVC) and Prefabricated Bathroom Units (PBUs) construction methods to enhance our productivity.

With proven capacity for managing large and complex projects, our reputation for delivering quality, on-time completion and within project budget is well recognized in the industry. 

As part of our continual efforts to innovate and expand our capability to ensure that we stay ahead of the industry standards, Guan Ho Construction Co (Pte) Ltd is investing in Virtual Design and Construction (VDC) to manage the integrated multi-discipline of design-build projects.

Our Vision

A Company best known for its People Development, Efficiency, Cutting-Edge Systems and Engineering Prowess to Manage Simple to Complex Building Construction.

Our Mission 

To develop a sustainability business model that delivers operational excellence in all aspects of the company’s activities and meet our commitments to every stakeholder we serve.

Our Policy

Guan Ho strives toward building a  SUSTAINABILITY Business Model of which incorporate a triple bottom line approach of people, planet and profit in our business conducts. We recognise that HUMAN CAPITAL is a success factor, hence, committed to people development with an ATTITUDE OF CAMARADERIE towards all our fellow colleagues and business partners. We will continually improve our PRODUCTIVITY and ensure all stakeholders benefit EQUITABLY from our achievements.

description:
CAST Laboratories Pte Ltd (‘CAST Lab’) was established in 1981 as an independent testing and quality centre. Headquartered at 17 Tuas Ave 8, CAST Lab operates in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Cambodia, Myanmar and Philippines.

CAST Lab is accredited by the Singapore Accreditation Council (SAC) under Singapore Laboratory Accreditation Scheme (SAC-SINGLAS) in accordance with ISO/IEC 17025 and ISO/IEC 17020 in the areas of: 
•	Civil Engineering Testing
•	Mechanical Testing 
•	Non-Destructive Testing
•	Calibration and Measurement

CAST Lab is also an Accredited Inspection Body for Structural Steelwork Inspection (ITA) and Site Investigation, and a Product Certification Body for Ready-Mixed Concrete accredited by the SAC.

Following the acquisition of CPG Laboratories (formerly the Singapore Public Works Department before it was privatised in 1999) in 2011, we are able to provide a wider array of services and greater economies of scale. 

We look forward to serving you and your business. 
Contact us for more information:
T: (65) 6801 6000
E: cast@castlab.com.sg

description:
ICE Singapore is a local association of the Institution of Civil Engineers (ICE), a registered charity that strives to promote and progress civil engineering.

Our mission is to put civil engineers "at the heart of society".

There are around 340 ICE members living in Singapore and working on a range of projects across the country. 

At the heart of our activities in Singapore are the volunteers who make up our local associations. The local association invites ICE members to meet regularly to exchange knowledge and ideas, visit interesting engineering sites and raise the profile of ICE and civil engineering within the area.

If you have any questions or you'd like to learn more about ICE's work in the region, please email to committee@icesingapore.com

description:
Founded over 35 years ago, ADAS Group is a global leader in the design, engineering, and construction of lightweight structures. With over 650 projects completed across 17 countries, we deliver cutting-edge solutions including PTFE/PVC Tensile Membrane Structures, ETFE Skylights, Air-Supported ETFE Cushion Roofs, Fabric Facades, and Architectural Steel solutions.

Driven by innovation and backed by decades of experience, our engineering culture thrives on research, development, and precision. This dedication has earned us multiple international patents and awards, positioning ADAS at the forefront of architectural innovation.

From iconic stadiums to elegant canopies, every project reflects our ability to transform ambitious ideas into functional, enduring designs. We offer end-to-end services—from concept and structural analysis to fabrication and installation—ensuring on-time, cost-efficient delivery without compromising architectural integrity.

As we continue to expand, ADAS has evolved into a diverse group of companies, encompassing specialized divisions such as ADAS Green, ADAS Metal, ADAS Racking, ADAS Byte, and ADAS Hightex Sdn Bhd our Malaysian counterpart—each contributing unique expertise to our shared vision of excellence.

At ADAS, we don’t just build structures; we build possibilities. Let us bring your imagination to life.

description:
Founded in 1995, the Prime Structures Group is a Singapore-managed group of companies providing building envelope solutions. 

We take an integrated approach to provide design, build, and supply solutions across Asia.

We pride ourselves on our ability to manage the challenges and complexities of providing complete building envelope solutions.

Our integrated approach lets us take ownership of our clients' building envelope. 

Our ﬂexibility and experience enable us to anticipate challenges in the process, ﬁnd innovative ways to solve problems and build buy-in from everyone along the way.

With our commitment to delivering the building envelope solution that meets our clients' goals, we give all a peace of mind.

We are in the business of Façade Design & Management where we focus on 4 main businesses offerings: 

1. BUILDING ENVELOPES 
We’ve developed innovative building envelopes that help to improve overall building design and maximize light and heat efficiency. As a certified Building Construction Authority of Singapore (BCA) CR16 L6  curtain wall contractor, we’re able to tender for curtain wall projects of unlimited amounts. 

2. CUSTOMISED STRUCTURES AND ART STRUCTURES
We have the engineering expertise to construct and install customised structures and art structures. The ‘Momentum’ by David Gerstein, and the ‘Wind Arbor’ art wall are two of our completed projects situated in prominent locations in Singapore. 

3. SECURITY FACADES
We’ve developed security facades that resolve environmental, structural and security threats in order to achieve secure buildings that are both aesthetically appealing and functional.

4. INTERIOR FIT-OUTS
We deliver end-to-end restoration, renovation and interior fit-out solutions on time while maintaining the highest standards of safety and quality.

description:
BtrLyf connects the building industry through open source Digital Twins for making informed and quick decisions in a $7 trillion building retrofit market. 

We use Digital Twinning principle based on Building Physics and AI to be able to predict and manage building performance through connection of sustainable technologies and funds. Our solution is based on the concept of 'Virtual Audits' that provides a way for remote, quick and low-cost energy assessments for buildings to start with. We have further combined this with augmented intelligence and collaboration technology to enhance stakeholder engagement and valuable data analytics. This is offered on a convenient cloud-based platform that connects stakeholders and offers them value-adding apps.

The built environment sector is the largest contributor to global greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions. Buildings use about 40 % of global energy, 25 % of global water, 40 % of global resources, and emit approximately 30 % of GHG emissions. These emissions are set to double by 2050 if we carry on business as usual. The current decarbonization approach in the industry is heavily reliant on experts that perform manual audits (energy assessments) that are time-consuming, inefficient, and costly. The built environment stakeholders such as building owners, facility managers, tech providers and financiers are not fully engaged in the process. This creates a barrier for rapid adoption of sustainable solutions in the industry. 

We will help accelerate the adoption of energy efficient/sustainable solutions through digitizing the whole industry ecosystem with our Open Source Digital Twins Collaborative tech platform. As a market accelerator, our solution will create more jobs and push the green economy further. With the digital approach, we will make green buildings highly accessible and economical for the society.

description:
Since our establishment in Singapore on 12 November 1975 as an overseas subsidiary of Nakano Corporation, Nakano Singapore (Pte) Ltd has been privileged to contribute to the continued growth of Singapore’s construction industry.

With our Clients’ support, Nakano Singapore has grown steadily over the years, undertaking many Residential, Commercial, Industrial, Hospitality and Conservation & Asset Enhancement Projects, both in conventional Build-Only and Design and Build arrangements.

Our company is accredited with ISO 9001, 14001 and 18001 standards and the BizSafe Star Certification. We embrace the industry quality standards like BCA’s CONQUAS and Quality Mark as workmanship benchmarks – our Rainforest EC project scored 95.0 points and Lush Acres EC project achieved CONQUAS Star.

We are especially honoured that BCA has ranked Nakano Singapore 1st position among the “Top 10 Contractor’s List” in its inaugral “Search for Quality Housing” portal in September 2017. This is recognition of our consistent exceptional quality in our finished products.

Leveraging on the expertise within our global network, anchored in our headquaters in Japan, Nakano Singapore aims to undertake Healthcare and Institutional projects and be technically competent for projects requiring Prefabricated, Prefinished, Volumetric Construction (PPVC) technology in the near future. 

Our continued success would not have been possible without your generous support. We thank you and look forward to your continuous patronage.

description:
History
Based on his idea to offer innovative, economical, high-quality solutions for individual constructions using system elements, Dr. -Ing. Max-Mengeringhausen developed the Mengeringhausen Rohrbauweise (tube/node construction) in the late 1930's. The foundation of MERO in 1949 was the beginning of a worldwide success for MERO Space Frames. 

Today, MERO has its corporate and design headquarters in Wuerzburg, Germany along with its production hall of 37,000 m² equipped with Lazer Welding Machinery, Welding Robots, Powder Coating Lines, etc. all to provide the accuracy, precision and quality which has been the hallmark of MERO. Projects of all sizes implemented around the world in various shapes and materials prove our quality and competitiveness. 

MERO offers a wide range of construction elements, which are distributed not only as individual product lines but also as packages or part turn-key solutions. The Construction Philosophy of transferring natural laws into construction technology has continued to shape the aims and methods of the company. Implementing state-of-the-art technologies in design, engineering, manufacturing and construction remains a part of MERO'S continued development in the field of façade technology.

Service
•	Construction Systems
•	Floor Systems
•	Airport Technik
•	Exhibit Systems
Specialty
Combining varied technologies, MERO specializes in the integration of the following products to provide a total solution to a building's façade. 
•	Architectural Steel
•	Spaceframes
•	Glass Fins
•	Cables
•	Point Supported Glass
•	Skylights
•	Curtain Wall
•	Aluminium Cladding
Global Presence

description:
Koizumi Lighting Technology Corp. (Japan) has more than 65 years of experience in lighting manufacturing. We have aggressively invested in the product R&D and manufacture of LED lightings. We are also able to manufacture based on custom specifications.

Koizumi Lighting Singapore (KLS) is a one-stop lighting solution provider with more than 30 years of experience in projects globally; namely in Singapore, Malaysia, Indonesia, Thailand, Australia, Myanmar, India, Japan, Philippines, Hong Kong, China,

OUR SERVICES

Over the years, the company has evolved, redefining its expertise in areas like the science of light, and its technicality. It has partnered with globally well-established lighting labels such as XAL, Lucifer, iGuzzini, Zumtobel, etc to leverage on their excellent marriage of engineering and design.

Koizumi has worked with Architects, Engineers, Designers, and Builders to provide solutions that focus on a combination of Supply, Install, Maintenance, and Lighting Design Support for projects around the world.

Catering to commercial buildings and offices, conservation projects, public and private housing, hotels, hospitals, and even factories. Koizumi Lighting Singapore excels in lighting for both the interior as well as the exterior of buildings, and landscaping projects.

In its lighting solutions, Koizumi is able to provide the necessary inputs for lighting design and the execution of the lighting plan. The specialist employs sophisticated manufacturer and independent proprietary lighting design software, to generate precise lighting calculations. These are also incorporated on autocad drawings to produce detailed lighting design proposals for the clients.


OUR MILESTONES

- ISO9001:2015, as 'a turnkey professional lighting supplier including design' certification.

- BCA Grade L6, qualifying us to tender for projects of unlimited value.

- GEBIZ Financial grade S8, qualifying us to tender for projects up to S$10million in value.

- BizSAFE level4

description:
Envisioning a future from one generation to the next, MORROW shapes lives through liveable and sustainable environments that foster identity, community, purpose, and possibilities.

Established in 2017 in Singapore, MORROW is a consultancy specialising in urban planning, urban design, and architecture. MORROW’s founder and Chairman, Dr Liu Thai Ker is recognised as the “Architect of Modern Singapore” 

MORROW’s team is made up of experienced specialists in urban planning and architecture. Applying proven scientific methodologies, MORROW engages in thorough research and design processes to propose sustainable and liveable master plans for government urban planning agencies and private developers worldwide.

MORROW adopts a similar approach to its architecture. From hotels to residences, cultural institutions and logistic hubs, the firm is adept in designing a wide range of building typologies. It draws inspiration from factors such as the context, culture, end-users and socio-economic conditions to create spaces that have a positive impact on the community.

description:
The Singapore institute of Planners is a professional organisation established in 1971 which is dedicated to the advancement of sustainable urban and regional planning with a view to create better communities and environments.

The Institute collaborates with government planning agencies including the Urban Redevelopment Authority, the Housing and Development Board, the JTC Corporation, the Centre for Liveable Cities and Institutes of Higher Learning.  The Institute is a member of the Design Singapore Council (DSg) which is now with the Economic Development Board (EDB) a statutory board under the Ministry of Trade and Industry (MTI).

The Institute is a corporate member of the Commonwealth Association of Planners (CAP), and in June 2016 it joined the Eastern Regional Organisation for Planning and Human Settlements (EAROPH). In Oct 2018, it has recently signed a MOU with the Hong Kong Institute of Surveyors, Planning and Development Division (HKIS-PPD) to promote programmes of mutual interest.

description:
WHO WE ARE

Urban Research Lab (URL) is an international multidisciplinary architectural practice based in Singapore.  We are an innovative research and development based studio with a reputation for contemporary and sustainable design.  Our expertise spans a broad range of sectors and typologies  from large scale master plans and airports to private house interiors. 
 
URL is staffed by a cosmopolitan team of designers from Europe, Asia, USA and Australia, our studio is currently designing projects in 14 separate countries and has received numerous awards and accolades for its work.

HOW WE WORK

Through our office based and collaborative research, we create buildings and products that are contemporary, contextual and sustainable.  This holistic design approach allows us to provide our clients with integrated design solutions for the most challenging of projects.   Our designers and engineers approach each project together to utilise our combined expertise and ensure creative design solutions.  

From the outset, we incorporate a sustainable design ethos.  Initially we employ passive techniques to ensure building orientation, form and site location all reduce energy consumption.  Environmental technologies specific to individual projects compliment the passive techniques to offer the most effective sustainable design solutions.

We work extremely closely with our clients, consultants and collaborators to foster strong working relationships to ensure our clients’ and our own aspirations for both best value and architectural excellence are achieved.   As part of our internal quality assurance system, formal design reviews are regularly undertaken by the directors to ensure the quality of the design  and best practice methodologies are constantly employed on all projects in the studio.  Informal reviews with participants from all disciplines are arranged at key stages of the design process  to encourage further research and the evaluate our designs.

description:
WY-TO is an employee-owned research and design built environment studio. Headquartered in Singapore, we lead experiential projects with a Planetary well-being approach in the design of cities, places, and spatial narratives for People.

Founded in 2010, our work focuses on implementing visionary strategies through human-centric experiences. Our presence across Singapore, Paris and Bali reflects the diversity of project typologies in Place Visioning, Masterplanning, Experiential Design, Culture Curation, Exhibition Design and Visual Communication, – enabling us to shape an international spectrum of interventions.

We collaborate with our clients in government and private sectors to engage stakeholders in achieving long-term responsible economies of scale. Leveraging our research and expertise in Well-being, our frameworks open up systemic opportunities and connect urban disciplines. Informed by our experience in South-East Asia and Europe, we enable innovative, bold and evidence-based sustainable practices in addressing climate challenges – creating holistic participatory phase plans for People-Planet continuities. 

Guided by our common philosophy, “Design with A Cause”, we aim to tailor scalable agile solutions for each project. Our methodology embeds research and refines through cultural context to inspire lovable places. Outlined by our Green Commitments – derived from international standards and echoing local policies – we rigorously set meaningful benchmarks for inclusive, delightful future cities co-adopted by community-led neighbourhoods. 

We are committed to grounding visionary foresight with strong empathy in design for transformative experiences that are relevant and resilient globally.

description:

company_name: SAS Asia Bar Systems Private Limited
description:
Established in 2012, SAS Asia Bar Systems Pte. Ltd. has been supplying high quality thread bars from our mother Company, Annahuette, to the Asian market. 

SAS bar systems feature high quality thread bars of various grades, up to prestressing steel quality, in a range of diameters from 12 to 75 mm. We provide various system solutions for a variety of technical engineering purposes, including thread bar anchors for mining and tunnelling, reinforcement connections, form ties, tie rods, soil nails, micropiles, rock and soil anchors for geotechnical applications as well as prestressing tendons for post-tensioning. 
 
Our SAS thread bar systems are used for connections, formwork and anchorages and have been installed in large-scale construction projects worldwide. Whether for building, underground, bridge or road construction, tunnelling or mining, SAS can supply the steel you need to get the job done. In the technical engineering sector, SAS system products have made us the leading global supplier of hot-rolled thread bars.

Quality and Know-how are more than just two words for us. 
It is our Company's mission which is evident in our processes and products.

description:
The Lighthouse Club is The Construction Industry charitable society, and at the same time is the focal point for all those working in, or connected with, the construction industry. Established in the UK in 1956, the Lighthouse Club now has branches worldwide – in the Asia Pacific Region there are branches in Bangkok, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Manila, Ho Chi Minh City and Singapore.

Each branch aims to promote fellowship and co-operation amongst all members in every respect and wherever possible and also to develop a Benevolent Fund to provide financial assistance to victims of accident or illness within the construction industry and to their dependents where a fatal accident has occurred.

The motto of the Lighthouse Club is “Aliis cum Humanitate” which translates as “Consideration for Others”.

The Lighthouse Club has two primary objectives, and the Club is non-political in all its activities.

The Lighthouse Club (Singapore) started in 2000 and is registered with the Registry of Societies, Government of Singapore under Unique Entity Number T00SS0060E

description:
At SCAL Academy, we are dedicated to providing top-quality training courses that cater to all levels of the workforce. As a learning service provider certified by SOCOTEC and accredited by the Singapore Accreditation Council, we are an approved training provider for SkillsFuture Singapore. We offer a wide range of construction safety, workplace safety and health courses, as well as courses in language, contractual, trade practices, and management. We are also an Autodesk authorized training center, offering courses in Autodesk Revit Architecture and Structure 2015 Essentials.

In addition to our training courses, we also offer workshops on a wide range of topics, including safety, environmental, innovation, contractual, legal, financial, government regulations, and office and administration skills. Our workshops are constantly updated to ensure relevance and to keep our trainees well-informed of the latest developments.

Our workshops are designed to equip industry practitioners with the most current skills and knowledge. Through case studies, group discussions, and hands-on exercises, our trainees benefit from the experience and expertise of our dedicated trainers.

We also offer customized training courses to meet the specific needs of our clients. Our medium of instruction is not limited to English, and we provide training in multiple languages to cater to non-English speaking trainees.

At SCAL Academy, we are committed to providing high-quality training that helps individuals and organizations improve their skills and knowledge. Contact us today to learn more about our training courses, seminars, and workshops.

description:
Established in 1975, Winner Engineering Pte Ltd has grown into one of Singapore’s most reputable mechanical and electrical (M&E) engineering contractors, delivering high-quality, reliable, and cost-effective solutions across the built environment.

To meet industry demands, we expanded our operations—first in 2002 to a 6,628 sqft facility at 38 Woodlands Industrial Park E1, and later in 2013 to our current 12,000 sqft premises at 18 Woodlands Industrial Park E1, supported by a 7,000 sqft compound. The facility includes an in-house dormitory, enhanced workshop fabrication, and expanded office space for our growing team.

From fewer than 20 employees, Winner Engineering has grown into a team of over 100 skilled professionals. Our in-house teams manage duct fabrication and installation, chilled water systems, electrical engineering, and maintenance services.

In October 2019, Winner Engineering became part of Exeo Global, the overseas headquarters of Kyowa Exeo Corporation, Japan. This strategic acquisition strengthened our capabilities through access to Exeo’s global expertise, resources, and technology.

As the industry embraces Design for Manufacturing and Assembly (DfMA) and Prefab MEP solutions, Winner Engineering is at the forefront of this transformation. We are a Tier 2 Prefabricated MEP Manufacturer under the BCA–STAS Accreditation Scheme, underscoring our commitment to quality, safety, and innovation. Our DfMA department leads the design, coordination, and production of prefabricated MEP systems—enhancing productivity, safety, and build quality while reducing on-site manpower and timelines.

Our BCA Contractors Registration System (CRS) registrations:
ME01 (Air-Conditioning, Refrigeration & Ventilation Works): L6
ME05 (Electrical Engineering): L3

At Winner Engineering, we deliver innovative, sustainable, and future-ready engineering solutions, continually evolving to meet our clients’ needs.

description:
SHIKI is an owner’s representative and project delivery consultancy specialising in complex, experience led projects across the Asia Pacific region.

We exist to protect creative, operational, and commercial intent as projects move from concept into delivery. As scope, cost, and technical complexity increase, original intent is often compromised through fragmentation, misalignment, or short term decision making. SHIKI is engaged to prevent that drift.

We work alongside owners and senior stakeholders to provide delivery leadership, governance, and decision frameworks that keep projects aligned, accountable, and buildable. Our role is not to replace project teams, but to unify them around clear objectives and informed decisions.

SHIKI operates across themed entertainment, location based entertainment, casinos and integrated resorts, exhibitions, and complex commercial and industrial developments. Our experience spans China, Southeast Asia, Japan, Australia, and the United States.

Engagements typically include owner’s representation, project governance and stage gate support, technical and systems integration oversight, vendor and consultant alignment, and project controls focused on risk, cost, and delivery outcomes.

SHIKI is most often engaged where projects are complex, high value, or strategically important, and where maintaining clarity and intent through delivery is critical to success.

description:
QXY RESOURCES PTE LTD is a specialist in Building Refurbishments and Interior Fit-out based in Singapore. QXY is a A2-graded contractor under the Building and Construction Authority of Singapore (BCA).

Founded in 2004, QXY started as a small building refurbishment contractor. Today, we have grown steadily to be an established company with a solid track record offering construction services in Addition & Alteration, Repair & Redecoration, Interior Design, and Design & Build. 

Over the years, QXY has successfully undertaken 100 public and private sector projects, involving close to 170 buildings. Our portfolio includes construction and interior decoration in a variety of sectors ranging from industrial, residential, commercial to institutional buildings. Our business is based on building long-term relationships with clients, partners and sub-contractors, with 70% of our projects coming from repeat clients.

QXY is registered under the Building and Construction (BCA) as a Class 1 builder. Our achievement of ISO 9001, ISO14001, OHSAS 18001 and bizSAFE certifications are testimony to its commitment to quality and strong sense of responsibility. 

QXY’s progress as a leading Small & Medium Enterprise (SME) was recognised with the Singapore SME 1000 Company award for 6 consecutive years between 2011 to 2016.  In 2016, we achieved a significant milestone by winning the Enterprise 50 Award.

QXY strives to be the choice builder in the Singapore construction industry and to realise our vision of becoming a trusted provider of integrated building and design services in Southeast Asia.

description:
PROSE Architects is headed by Alvin Liau. 
He earned his design chops at Teh Joo Heng Architects working on small boutique projects. He scaled up his abilities at Surbana International Consultants, directly interacting with the end user for public housing projects, concurrently switching seamlessly to the different approach required of private housing developments. He subsequently spent seven years at DP Architects Pte Ltd, gaining valuable experience working on the DUO mixed-use development & leading a range of different development typologies. 
He left DP Architects Pte Ltd as an Associate Director and deputy head of the residential typology group in end 2019. He set up PROSE Architects in early 2020, having come full circle learning from a small design studio to an international corporate full-suite architectural consultancy. 
Now with his own studio, there is still much to learn.     

Clarity Through Design.

Architecture must speak a clear and concise language when completed. This creates the fundamentals for PROSE Architects to be both excited by emergent hybrid typologies, and yet still be intrigued by the seemingly banal.

We listen, to reveal the root issues.
This is an iterative process with the end-user so we can grasp the key concerns.

We pause, to learn and unlearn.
This keeps us grounded, maintains an open mind, and prevents hasty architectural solutions. We want to digest the root issues. We want to extract unique opportunities which can be nurtured into unexpected positive results.

We collaborate, in an inclusive process.
This delivers stress-tested design which relates, rather than dictates, to the end-user.

We embrace, boring.
It is a matter of perspective. The glass can be half empty, or half full.

description:
We are window dressing specialists, always on the forefront of fashionable window styles. Balancing the spectrum of light within space requires mastery of art and science. 

Founded upon our ambition to contribute to the environment and architectural landscape, The Shades Lab holds firm to our humble passion to provide technical expertise, proficient know-how’s in window dressing and exemplary service.

The pleasure is ours as we work with our esteemed alliance who share our belief that quality, skill and workmanship are instrumental. 

Our partner includes Coulisse, the leading global fashion brand in window coverings from The Netherlands, for which we hold exclusive distributorship in Singapore. Equiluxe is our private label, specially curated to meet the multi-faceted requirements of each development.

The Shades Lab is honoured to collaborate with highly acclaimed developers and architects to create iconic landmarks. Our recent projects include commercial, hospitality and integrated development:
>  Award-winning Tanjong Pagar Centre (Sofitel Hotel & offices), presently the tallest building in Singapore;
> DUO Tower, a Green Mark Platinum certified mixed integrated development;
> Shangri-La Hotel, the epitome of luxury hotels and,
> Mandarin Orchard, an award-winning icon of world-class Asian hospitality

We have also dedicated our expertise to beautify windows in homes along Avon Road and Gladiola Road. Take a visual tour at www.theshadeslab.com.

[Philosophy]

Withholding strict standards from manufacturing to installation, each project is respected with utmost importance. The Shades Lab’s myriad collection of product offerings are individually screened and checked to ensure they meet the highest standards of quality benefiting the owner, end-user as well as the broader environment.

With our profound experience across the local landscape, as well as developments in the region, we hope to make a difference to the world we live in – one project at a time.

description:
Innovez Engineering is a leading design-and-build specialist of large commercial and residential swimming pools, spas and water features. Based in Singapore, Innovez Engineering is a pioneer in the construction of stainless steel swimming pools in Asia. With networks both locally and abroad, Innovez Engineering has the capability and know-how to successfully deliver projects anywhere in the world.

Innovez is French for innovate. At Innovez Engineering, we aim to constantly improve engineering and building methods by using the latest in innovation. Working with the best-in-class engineering and technologies, Innovez Engineering challenges the boundaries of conventional swimming pool building.

In 2010, Innovez Engineering successfully constructed the 150-metre long infinity pool on the 57th storey SkyPark on top of the Marina Bay Sands Singapore. Pre-engineered and pre-fabricated in stainless steel, the SkyPark Pool was constructed in a just seven months.

Innovez Engineering provides the complete spectrum of products and services integral in the design, building and operation of a swimming pool facility. This encompasses consultancy, design engineering, construction works, maintenance services, as well as the manufacture, supply and installation of high-grade aquatic equipment and systems.

description:
Founded in 1971, Architects Studio is an inter-disciplinary architectural design practice based in Singapore. Architects Studio provides professional architectural services to the private sector, and also services as principal consultant for various projects for statutory boards and government bodies. Services include architectural design, space planning, interior design, urban design and project management consultancy.

Outside Singapore, the firm has completed projects in the Republic of Maldives and has completed the design of projects in Malaysia, the People’s Republic of China, Cambodia, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam and the Republic of Mongolia. The firm had also signed an association agreement with the Zhejiang Provincial Urban-Rural Comprehensive Design Institute based in Hangzhou, Zhejiang Province, People’s Republic of China, providing architectural design, town planning, urban planning and interior design for projects anywhere in the world.

Architects Studio is continuously and actively seeking associations with progressive architects worldwide to form a global alliance to provide professional services.

description:
SYSTRA is a leading transport consulting and engineering firm and we are proud to announce the launch of our new Linkedin page dedicated to the activities of our Singapore office.  Our local office has provided Traffic and Transport Consultancy Services here since 2001, and in 2019 we established the Asia-wide Systems Engineering Centre here to serve both Singapore and the surrounding region. We can access more than 8,000 dedicated professionals in the global SYSTRA group to support our works in Singapore and the region.
 
Our local Traffic team includes capabilities in:
•	Traffic Impact Assessments (TIAs)
•	Masterplanning and Master Layout Planning for Developments
•	Car Parking and Vertical Transport studies
•	Temporary Traffic Management During Construction
•	Bus and Rail Depot planning
•	Local Area Traffic Studies
•	Smart Mobility Planning
•	Highway and Public Transport Studies
•	Airport and Port Access and Layout Studies
•	Traffic Surveys and Data Analysis
•	Demand Modelling

•	System Assurance: Safety, RAM, Cybersecurity, Human Factors 
•	Sub-systems: Rolling Stock, Signalling, Power Supply, Telecommunications, Platform Screen Doors, OCC and SCADA, Ticketing, 
•	Project Technical coordination 
 
For further information, please refer to www.systra.com

description:
Having over 10 years of experiences in the construction industry, we are committed to stay true to our course – being responsible to the environment and ensure its sustainability.

At D-Team, we commit to building a sustainable future by supporting clean and green energy. As a company that specializes in the HVAC business, we understand that our business can have a great impact on the environment, which is why we have made it our mission to minimize that impact by using the latest technologies and best practices.

In a climate like Singapore where the use of HVAC systems is everywhere, we ensure that wherever possible, we push solutions that are energy optimizing and reduces energy consumption.

Our team of experienced professionals is dedicated and committed to our company’s mission – to design and install energy efficient HVAC systems that are both environmentally friendly and cost-effective. We also have a proven track record of success, credentials, and industry-recognized certifications to show our commitment and promises to be environmentally responsible and sustainable.

We believe that by supporting clean and green energy, we are doing our part in creating a healthier planet for our future generations. We stay committed to work with both external and internal parties to reduce energy consumption and incorporate renewable energy sources and promote sustainable practices in all aspects of our business.

description:
The SANDBOX STUDIO team is a collaboration of talent, energy and experience comprising of Architects, Interior Designers, Space Planners, Project Managers, Engineers and subject matter specialists.

SANDBOX STUDIO is a specialist boutique design practice that offers specialized design and styling to a regional client base. description:
We are a home-grown architectural practice with a global presence. Through our work with numerous local and regional healthcare and research institutions, we have developed a wealth of knowledge and expertise in the design of healthcare facilities, different types of laboratories and high-containment facilities. Our role as a designer is closely tied with our role as a medical planner or a laboratory planner, as the flow of people and work processes are foremost to the design of such facilities.

A design should not only be functional but should also be enlivening. We strive to create an identity to a facility, leaving visitors and staff members an emotional memory of the facility after departure. We encourage collaborations through creating spaces for deliberate interactions, and pause spaces for chance encounters.

Our design starts with listening to the users’ needs, paying close attention to the users’ desired experience in the future facility, and to realize their vision through empathy-in-design and close attention to detail. Efficiency of work processes is also a vital component of our design process, and when called for, we will put on our process re-engineering hat to work with users in materializing improvements in our design.

Our team of professionals is tight-knit and collaborative, allowing us to have an amalgam of different minds and experiences, augmenting each other’s strengths to bring value to our clients beyond just design.

For more information, please visit our website or email us: contact@archlab.com.sg

description:
Zarch is an architectural studio practicing within the conventional realms of architecture and planning; an atelier that deploys architectural thinking within a collaborative sphere of arts, design and beyond. We are skilled at responding to constraints of complex projects and turning them into opportunities for realising their desired potential. Our portfolio showcases diversity and agility in delivering bespoke projects of deep value to our clients through meticulous approach and sensitivity.

Zarch cultivates a forward-looking approach bolstered with a strong commitment to sustainability. We believe sustainability can inform the design, planning and programming of buildings, not merely as ‘plug-in’ solutions but in a holistic way that enable building occupants to reflect upon the environment. Our approach has been described as ‘agile’, mixing research, innovation and experimentation, incorporating multimedia and technology into the spaces we design as we look towards the future of architecture.

Our projects range from conservation of historic buildings, clubhouses, galleries, offices and F&B tailored to specific site, phasing and other operational requirements. We explore how conventional or traditional programs may be re-imagined and combined to create new patterns, opportunities and artistic expression that adapt to future work and lifestyle.

description:
HG Group is a corporate entity comprising several subsidiaries in Singapore, Indonesia, Myanmar, and Malaysia. HG Group have shaped a strong reputation as one of the largest steel distributors and processors around the region. We add value by bridging the gap between upstream steel producers and end users of steel.

We are sturdy like steel, yet flexible enough to understand and meet our client’s unique and changing need. Change is constant and we believe in always gaining new perspectives to advance with evolving market trends.

With more than 750,000 square feet of land area, HG Group has one of the largest warehouse and processing facilities. We provide one-stop, end-to-end solutions to our clients. Other related services that HG Group is involved with include wholesale activities and sourcing of products. Our value-added services include steel finishing and customization services, logistics, and shipping.

Our operations are carried out on a daily basis under the supervision of HG Group through the following subsidiaries.

HG Metal Manufacturing
HG Construction Steel
Oriental Metal
First Fortune International
As our entire group is based on the collective efforts of its subsidiaries, we are currently handling about 300,000 tones of steel products on a yearly basis.

Behind our nearly unmatched capacity and quality are a modern processing and production facility which has an area of 800,000 square feet and an expert team of operation and logistics experts as they handle export and local shipments.

We keep modernizing our operations and enriching our knowledge to maintain our proven ability to respond to the needs of our customers and/or clients.

description:

For Civil and Ground Engineering, our subsidiary Presscrete Engineering Pte Ltd provides services are categorized under 3 main branches, namely Ground Engineering Services, Tunnelling Services and Civil and Special Engineering Services. description:
Kenston Construction Pte Ltd was formed as a sole proprietor in 1984.

From that time on, it has engaged itself in Building Construction activities such as Residential Houses, Factories, Warehouses, Institutions, Commercial Buildings, Sport Centres, etc.

Due to the growth of the firm, it was converted to a Private Limited Company in 1990.

The company is a Registered Contractor with the Building & Construction Authority under the head reference of CW-01 for General Building with a financial grade of B2. It is also registered under the head reference of CW-02 for Civil Engineering with a financial grading of C3. The company was successfully upgraded to ISO 9001:2000 in December 2006. The company has since been fully upgraded to ISO 14001:2004 in May 2013.

The present paid-up capital of the company is S$2.7 million and authorized capital of S$4.0 million. Financially, the company is in turn supported by its bankers with banking facilities extended for present and future projects.

Currently, the Company is a leading Engineering, Procurement and Construction Management (EPCM) Contractor, working for distinguished clients and partnering with competent sub-trade contractors for the successful completion of any project.

Today, as always, the company is committed to provide the best quality and reliable works through continuous improvement and achievement of excellence.

description:
With 32 years of experience in the industry, we have undertaken a transformative journey, adapting to the dynamic demands of today’s market. In pursuit of our commitment to continuous growth, we proudly established ADECOTECH Pte Ltd.

This strategic move empowers us to align with industry trends and significantly expand our service portfolio to comprehensively address our clients’ diverse needs.

Drawing from over a decade of experience in delivering exceptional interior and M&E projects of iconic stature prior to the inception of ADECOTECH, we are uniquely positioned to seamlessly integrate and coordinate both MEP and ID requirements, ensuring the highest standards of quality and functionality.

ADECOTECH understands the need to provide an integrated service to new developing projects and subsequent building maintenance after completion, therefore we are now a one-stop company that specializes in 2 main areas – Construction and Property Management to better serve the developers from construction stages to maintenance stages.
In Construction, we provide A&A, Interior fit-out, and M&E services by our core team and in-house trade services.
In Property Management, we provide facilities and estate management services, where we can undertake maintenance services contracts after project completion or to existing buildings where services are needed.
Under M&E services, not only can we install Chilled Water Systems, we also do we specialize in developing designs for Air-conditioning and Mechanical Ventilation Systems, Electrical and Fire Protection Systems.
ADECOTECH is actively participating in all sectors, especially in public and private tenders, concurrently expanding its business operations in Singapore and Overseas.

description:

Traart was established in 2001. Subsequent expansion led to the incorporation of Traart Pte Ltd in 2003 and is the first interior architectural design firm dedicated exclusively to corporate office interior design in SIngapore. Our staffs are qualified by education and experience to identify research and creatively solve problems relative to the function and quality of people’s built environment.

description:
PPI Engineering Pte Ltd (PPI) is a Singapore based company incorporated to be a design & build specialist contractor to provide solutions for BUILDABILITY to both buildings and civil engineering works. PPI offers engineering system and construction, post-tensioning design & execution and precasting services to assist the clients in enhancing their projects’ buildability and cost-effectiveness.

We strongly believe that the People factor is imperative to success in the organization. Therefore, our governing caption – “Relationship precedes Ministry”* exhibits our care to both our staffs and clients by providing them a conducive environment and professional services respectively.

PPI has a core team of highly experienced & passionate Managements, Engineers and Supervisors with supported trade-skilled workforce. We are committed to complete our works without leaving any hassle to our clients.

PPI Precast Pte Ltd is a leading manufacturer of quality Prestressed Precast Concrete and Precast Reinforced Concrete Products for infrastructure, building structure and offshore structure projects in Singapore.

Today, PPI Precast Pte Ltd having played a vital role in the development of various flyovers, bridges, ports, jetties, wharves, the Mass Rapid Transit System (MRT), Housing Development Board (HDB) building and private building; we have established ourselves as one of the leading manufacturers of quality precast concrete products & prestressed concrete products. Innovation, product quality, service and reliability are our biggest asset.

We have the expertise and facilities to manufacture, transport and launch beams of more than 46 m length and 198 T in weight for the construction of bridges & flyovers. description:
At Anderco, trust is the foundation of everything we build.

For over 30 years, we’ve delivered more than 10,000 projects—on time, every time, with zero compromises on safety. Whether large or small, simple or complex, our promise remains the same: to deliver high-quality, dependable solutions with precision and care.

With deep expertise in structural steel, architectural works, and fast-track, prefabricated solutions, Anderco is the trusted partner for construction, industrial, and commercial clients who demand results—with integrity.

From high-performance steel structures to container customisation and modular facilities, we bring smart, practical solutions to every project. Our work supports Singapore’s critical infrastructure—from public housing and transport to education and aviation—shaping spaces that serve millions every day.

As a Category S1 Accredited Structural Steel Fabricator by the Singapore Structural Steel Society, we meet the highest standards in safety, workmanship, and technical rigour.

But what truly drives us is our people—the heartbeat of Anderco. Passionate, skilled, and committed, our team listens closely, works collaboratively, and delivers with purpose. Because to us, it’s never just about the build—it’s about building right, and building with heart.

What sets us apart isn’t just what we build, but how we build it:
 With integrity – putting people and safety first
 With confidence – backed by deep technical expertise and a proven track record
 With care – offering responsive, reliable support at every step

Our Core Capabilities:
 Structural Steel & Metal Works
 Fast-Track & Modular Facilities
 Architectural & Façade Works
 Building & Construction
 Dismantling & Reinstatement

We don’t just build infrastructure—we build trust, enduring partnerships, and meaningful outcomes.

Safe. Solid. Swift.
Let’s build smarter. Together.

company_name: Keong Hong Holdings Limited (强枫控股有限公司)
description:
Headquartered in Singapore and established in 1983, our Group’s core businesses are building construction, property development and investment, as well as hotel development and investment. The Group develops and owns properties and hotels across Singapore and the Maldives.

Keong Hong entered Singapore’s property development market in 2012 with the launch of Twin Waterfalls, a 728-unit Executive Condominium (EC) project in Punggol. This was followed by several residential developments including SkyPark Residences EC, The Amore EC, Parc Life EC, Seaside Residences, and The Antares.

The Group expanded into hotel development and investment with two resort projects in the Maldives: Mercure Maldives Kooddoo Resort and Pullman Maldives Maamutaa Resort. 

To strengthen its building construction business, the Group pursued vertical integration through strategic acquisitions in 2017. This expanded its capabilities in metal formworks, timber flooring, decking, trellis, and roofing, boosting supply chain resilience and competitiveness and ensuring consistent quality and efficiency across residential and commercial projects.

The Group was upgraded to the Singapore Exchange Mainboard on 2 August 2016, following its initial listing on the Catalist Board on 16 December 2011. description:
Niva Solutions is a specialist in mud engineering and professional drilling fluid services. Successful drilling fluid management will minimize drilling downtime and help contractors to complete their projects in time and on budget. Our mud engineers offer on-site technical support, quality control, laboratory services, and state-of-the-art drilling fluid equipment.

Mud engineers
Our mud engineers are available worldwide and can provide on-site or remote technical support for a variety of drilling applications. We are specialized in mud engineering for drilling projects involving HDD, pipe jacking, microtunneling, tunneling, direct pipe, drilling in marine and coastal environments, and deep foundations. A further field of expertise is in the construction of diaphragm walls and cut-off walls. We provide comprehensive geotechnical investigation and drilling fluid guidelines customized to the project.

Laboratory services and drilling fluid testing equipment
We provide access to fully-equipped lab facilities to facilitate important tests, evaluate ground conditions, and help you determine the right mud program. 

Mud academy
As a part of our Niva Solutions Mud Academy, we train construction teams to understand the complexity of drilling fluid management. We provide training at different levels depending on the background knowledge and field experience.

description:
Mun Soon Industries Pte Ltd is an aluminium windows and doors company that specializes in delivering top-notch products and services. As a bizSAFE STAR certified company, we have reached the pinnacle of Workplace Safety & Health (WSH) Safety and Risk Management Excellence, reflecting our unwavering commitment to maintaining a secure and protected working environment.

At Mun Soon Industries, we take great pride in our innovative approach to design and functionality. Our proprietary in-house system, MS38, has undergone rigorous testing and certification by TÜV SÜD, a renowned testing company, to meet Singapore Standards for air leakage, watertightness, structural performance, and proof load tests. In this system, it includes high-quality accessories from European manufacturers and hardware specialists.  This ensures that our products deliver exceptional performance and reliability.

In addition, as a Schüco premium partner since 2008, we bring the expertise and precision of one of the industry's foremost suppliers of top-quality window, door, and façade systems made from aluminium.

With Mun Soon Industries, you can expect excellence in every aspect of our products and services. From our commitment to workplace safety to our cutting-edge technologies and prestigious partnerships, we are dedicated to transforming spaces with stylish, durable, and high-performing aluminium windows and doors.

description:
Overview
Aguner siphonic system is a Singapore-based engineering company specializing in advanced siphonic roof drainage systems. 

Our core mission is to revolutionize rainwater management in urban and architectural projects
through smart, space-efficient, and sustainable designs.

Our Expertise
Aguner designs and supplies fully SS525-compliant siphonic roof drainage systems, supporting projects across
factories, MRT stations, commercial towers, hotels, and high-rise residential buildings. 

Our in-house team
integrates Revit-based design workflows, hydraulic calculations, and BIM coordination for seamless project delivery.

Key Innovation 
SmartFlow+ is Aguner's proprietary smart siphonic system, featuring IoT-enabled flow sensors, QR-coded outlets for O&M tracking, and BIM-ready components. It offers real-time performance monitoring and supports Green Mark innovation credits for sustainable developments.

Why Aguner
- Flexible and fast design turnaround
- Fully BIM-integrated with Revit libraries
- Cost-efficient uPVC-based systems with SS525 compliance
- SmartFlow+ enabled for intelligent facility management
- Transparent documentation and submission-ready packages

description:
JAGROUP is a multi-disciplinary firm specialising in interior architecture and design for hospitality and commercial sectors, was established and founded by Mr Jeremy Soo. The Group’s business operations are divided into 4 business units: JA Consultancy Pte Ltd, JA Contracts, JA Management and JA Products & Media.

As the Principal Consultant of JAGROUP, Jeremy brings close to 23 years of Planning and Design experience, derived from his extensive background working with several other high profile architecture and design firms such as the award-winning US-based Hirsch Bedner Associates (HBA) Design Consultants, an acknowledged world leader in hospitality design; the renowned Hoadley Budge Olphert & Edwards Madigan Torzillo Briggs (S) Pte Ltd (HBO+EMTB),a leading architectural practice based in Australia; and RSP Architects Planners & Engineers Pte Ltd, one of the world’s top architects.

Jeremy’s extensive portfolio included Hilton Beijing Hotel, JW Marriott Beijing Hotel, Marriott Executive Apartment Wangfujing Beijing and Huafa Clubhouse & Residential Zhuhai in China, Siam Kempinski Hotel Bangkok in Thailand, Marriott Hotel and Resort Waterfront Kota Kinabalu Sabah, Petaling Jaya Marriott Hotel and Resort, Petaling Jaya Autograph Hotel, WP hotel Kuala Lumpur and Penang Olive Tree Hotel in Malaysia; Kia Peng Mixed-use Development in Malaysia; TripleOne Somerset Office Lobby,Tower Fifteen Offices, SIA Airline House Office, SIA Engineering Office and SIA CCB Training Centre Office in Singapore; The Vista Clubhouse and Retail Mall HCMC and Novaland Sunrise City Residential Towel HCMC in Vietnam and more.

HO CHI MINH, VIETNAM - Rep Office 
SURABAYA, INDONESIA - Rep Office

Our extensive inventory includes top-tier construction and facade adhesives, sealants, waterproofing solutions, firestops, acoustic sealants, flooring adhesives, mortars, and admixtures. Our knowledgeable sales teams, trained by industry leaders, are dedicated to providing tailored product solutions to meet your needs. In addition, our warehouse racking division excels in designing and installing a comprehensive range of storage systems for offices and warehouses, optimizing space and efficiency.

Since our establishment in 1981, we have built a reputation as a trusted partner in delivering reliable products and solutions. Our partnerships with leading manufacturers enable us to offer unparalleled technical support and aftersales warranties, ensuring peace of mind for our customers.

Our products have been integral to iconic projects in Singapore, including Marina Bay Sands, Resorts World Sentosa, Singapore Sports Hub, Marina One, Raffles Hotel, and various MRT stations. We also proudly serve customers throughout the region, affirming our commitment to excellence and innovation.

description:

AE Asia maintains its position as leading provider of cost effective, state-of-the-art fabrication facilities for the semiconductors, the media and data storage devices production industry, Biotechnology, Electronics Component and Special clean room Projects.

description:
Lam Hong Group was founded in Singapore in 1946 and is acknowledged as an established stockist and supplier of premium Lifting & Rigging equipment. We are also recognised for being an exclusive distributor of several industry-leading brands in the Marine & Offshore, Oil & Gas and Construction industries globally.

LH Machinery was founded on the core values of reliable service, consistent quality, and prompt delivery. Backed by 80 years of group experience in the marine, offshore, construction, and heavy-lifting industries, we have built a deep understanding of the challenges our clients face, enabling us to deliver practical and effective solutions.

As an innovation-driven company, we develop practical, high-performance tools under our in-house Haosail brand, designed in collaboration with a team of international engineers. Our products are supported by a robust risk management process, dedicated technical and customer service with comprehensive training programs to ensure maximum value and reliability.

In addition, LH Machinery is the exclusive distributor of Von Arx, a leading Swiss manufacturer of surface preparation equipment, for Singapore and Southeast Asia, expanding our offerings with top-tier solutions for concrete and steel surface treatment. At LH Machinery, we provide more than products, we deliver dependable solutions built for performance and longevity.

We Meet All Your Construction Needs Under One Roof.

Lam Hong Group of Companies:
Lam Hong (S) Pte Ltd
Lam Hong Renewables Pte Ltd
LH Machinery Pte Ltd
Inka Testing Services Pte Ltd

description:
TopAir Engineering Pte Ltd provides engineering consultation and services in the following areas:

Air-Conditioning & Mechanical Ventilation (ACMV)
Refrigeration & Insulation (Cold Room, Processing Room, Clean Room, etc.)
Mechanical (Chilled Water System; Machine Set-up and Assembly etc.)
Electrical (Standard Control Panels or Customized Control Panels etc.)
Turnkey Project Management (Design, Fabrication, Installation, etc.)
Local Authorization Submission Works (BCA, NEA, HDB, etc.)

About Us:
TopAir Engineering Pte Ltd was established by Mr. Ding Teck Hong in 2008 to provide specialized Air-conditioning & Mechanical Ventilation (ACMV) and mechanical installation services for consumer, commercial and industrial buildings. Under  Mr. Ding’s leadership, TopAir has continued to grow from strength to strength throughout the years and has now firmly established itself as a genuine and credible engineering company in Singapore with a wide and varied client base within the commercial, industrial and domestic sectors.

 

TopAir always strives to establish our client’s project requirements quickly and accurately and to respond effectively to their needs with synergistic and flexible solutions. Our team is committed to building and maintaining a professional, client-focused business, where reliance on recommendations and referrals for future contracts are very important. We believe that our commitment to this principle has been a major contribution towards our success in securing numerous ACMV projects and repeat customers.

 

Vision
To be a market leader in the ACMV-R engineering industry, possessing exceptional service capabilites and utilising creative, flexible, innovative and advanced technologies.

 

Mission
To build long-term relationships with our customers by offering specialized & enhanced services that exceed their expectations and ensure smooth operation and profitability.

description:
Mediera is a modular built environment venture focused on delivering sustainable, adaptable, and human-centric solutions across Southeast Asia and beyond. We design and implement networked townships and circular construction models that bridge the urban-rural divide, powered by design thinking and scalable innovation.

Our work is structured across four key divisions:
- Solutions – Sustainable building systems, modular housing, project advisory, and turnkey project delivery.
- Smart Materials & Trading – Sourcing and trading of responsible, circular, and low-carbon materials tailored for modular construction.
- Innovation Ventures – Co-developing and prototyping technologies across IoT, carbon tracking, digital twins, and renewable infrastructure.
- Advocacy & Impact – Driving social innovation, digital ecosystem activation, placemaking, and capacity building with communities and partners.
- We combine practical delivery with long-term system change — enabling resilient townships and future-viable livelihoods through smart design, innovation, and collaboration.
----
关于我们（中文版）
Mediera 专注于模块化建筑和可持续社区开发，推动东南亚城乡融合与循环经济。我们结合设计思维与创新实践，打造适应未来需求的联网小镇和建筑解决方案。

我们的四大业务板块包括：
- 解决方案：模块建筑、可持续设计、项目顾问与方案交底
- 智能材料与贸易：低碳与循环建材的采购与供应
- 创新项目：联合开发物联网（Blockchain， IoT）、碳追踪与可再生技术
- 倡导与影响力：社会创新、数字生态建设与地方赋能

我们致力于实现兼具商业可行性与社会价值的建筑未来。

description:

At Squarish, we design spaces that do more than look good—they feel good, function well, and do good for the planet. Based in Singapore, we are a boutique interior and architecture studio offering sustainable, human-centric design solutions for residential, commercial, and hospitality projects.

Whether it’s a full renovation, design consultation, or turnkey project management, we bring intentionality, creativity, and care to every space we transform. From reclaimed wood to eco-friendly finishes, our projects reflect both aesthetic beauty and environmental responsibility.

 What We Do:
Full-Service Interior & Architectural Design

Online Design Packages for Budget-Conscious Clients
Subscription-Based Design Support for Businesses

Deep commitment to sustainability & wellness-focused design
Professional team led by an accredited interior designer
Transparent communication and client-focused solutions
Passion for nature, culture, and timeless style
We’re here to help you design better—not just for now, but for the future.

description:
Sen Interior Design is a company that specialize in design consultation and project management

As an interior design company, we specialize in providing a range of services to help bring your vision to life. Our team of experts is dedicated to providing exceptional service and high-quality design solutions that are tailored to meet your specific needs.

One of our core services is 3D rendering, which allows you to see a realistic and detailed visual representation of your space before any construction or renovations take place. Our 3D renderings are highly detailed and accurate, providing you with a clear understanding of what your space will look like once the project is completed.

In addition to 3D rendering, we also offer project management services to ensure that your project is completed on time and within budget. Our team has extensive experience managing interior design projects of all sizes, and we are committed to delivering exceptional results every step of the way.

Finally, our design consultancy services are designed to provide you with expert advice and guidance throughout the design process. Whether you're looking for inspiration, guidance on materials and finishes, or assistance with selecting the right furniture and accessories, our team is here to help.

At our interior design company, we are committed to providing our clients with exceptional service and outstanding design solutions. Contact us today to learn more about how we can help you bring your vision to life.

description:
BIM VISTA was setup with the objective of providing end-to-end BIM solutions to AEC industry across the world. BIM Vista is promoted by BIM professionals based in Singapore with over 16 years of combined experience in Architectural and Engineering practice and Professional Services Management consulting. 

BIM VISTA offers effective solutions for companies to realize better ways of working and better outcomes for their businesses and the built world. We provide services using a holistic process of creating and managing information for a built asset based on model creation enabled by cloud platform and produce a digital representation of an asset across its lifecycle from planning and design to construction and operation. 

Highly experienced professionals from all AEC disciplines forms the core BIM production team and project management team. At BIM Vista we believe that quality is our utmost priority and we are always looking out for our customers, speeding up job completion on-time by identifying appropriate areas for the materials and saving costs without an increase in errors. 

BIM Vista offers 360 AEC services for the entire lifecycle of the building
2D Drawings Conceptual Design, 3D Visual design, 4D Construction scheduling, 5D Cost Estimation, 6D energy analysis, 7D As-built and Facility management, Family Creation, BIM Implementation, BIM Consultation, CDE, BIM coordination and Clash Detection, Laser Scan to BIM .

description:
Our roots

HomeVista is the brainchild of our founders, two interior design gurus who started their careers as freelancers. They share the same passion for bringing stylish interior design to everyone, both for the home and the office. Combining their energies, experiences and ideas, HomeVista began infusing homes with style and substance in November 2012.   


Vision

Here, we aim to revolutionize the interior design discipline, both for the client and the industry. For us, we do not see ourselves merely as bringing interior design to our clients. We believe that every project is a story that is waiting to be told, a story that encompasses needs, wants, form and function. We also aim to be a thought leader in our field where our values, principles and ideas help shape and raise the bar of the interior design industry as a whole.


Mission

For every client, our mission is to bring them stylish interior design while never compromising on practicality, quality, and bringing them the best value. 


Values

Over here, education is one of the key values that we regard highly. Education comes not in the form of academic grades, but sharing with our clients scopes such as design concept ideas and in-depth product knowledge, thus enabling them to make better decisions when designing their home. 

Our designers also receive countless education and exposure opportunities. Skills upgrading is constantly in our books. We inculcate a culture of knowledge sharing, allowing everyone, no matter senior or junior, to teach and learn from each other. We believe that a highly skilled designer is better able to attain and exceed our customers’ expectations.

Each project exudes its individual characteristics as how our clients have their individualized requirements. The Personal Experience in everything we do is as important as the beautiful designs we bring to our clients.

description:

Pronounced “lucid”, the name reflects a clarity of thought and a conscious design approach that leaves room for experimentation.

Founded by a duo shaped by two disciplines: Architecture and Production Design. The practice approaches spatial design with both rigor and imagination, balancing technical clarity with narrative, atmosphere, and lived experience.

Every project is treated as inherently personal. Rather than standardized solutions, Studio Luuseed works closely with clients through a collaborative process to create spaces that are thoughtful, specific, and reflective of the people who inhabit them.

With over 15 years of combined experience across architecture, interior design, construction, and production design, the team’s background as designers and makers informs a practical, hands-on methodology, ensuring ideas are carried through with care from concept to completion.

At its core, Studio Luuseed values clarity, communication, and trust- which forms the foundation of a collaborative journey.

description:

Our expertise lies in the design and fabrication of a wide range of fire-rated and heat-insulating glazing systems for commercial, industrial, and residential buildings, as well as the marine and offshore industries. Our fire-rated systems are extensively performance tested for stability, integrity and insulation, ensuring they are highly dependable and of the highest quality.

VJF SYSTEMS PTE LTD is committed to providing our clients with a reliable, sustainable, and secure lifestyle through our fire-rated glass protection solutions. Our full-featured solution offers different levels of protection, and we are proud to have the support of our renowned European principals.

In addition to fire-rated glass protection, we also offer a full spectrum of solutions for safety glass, including bullet-resistant glass, noise insulation glass, and security glass. Our skilled professionals are dedicated to delivering the highest quality products and services to our clients in Singapore and beyond.

Contact VJF SYSTEMS PTE LTD today to learn more about our fire-rated glass protection solutions and how we can help you achieve a safer and more secure environment for your building or facility.

description:
