Our track record of successfully mitigating business disruption is perhaps the best testimony to the difference between what proper business continuity planning and disaster restoration can make. When things go wrong despite all reasonable precautions, our disaster recovery expertise could help you avert painful and costly losses. Thus, you will have peace of mind knowing that potential threats and vulnerabilities to your businesses have effectively been addressed.

description:
Xpress Surveys & FMC Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based surveying company specializing in delivering accurate, efficient, and technology-driven solutions to the construction industry. With decades of combined field experience and a forward-thinking approach, we support developers, main contractors, and consultants with critical site data that drives smart decisions.

Our core expertise includes:

Pre- & Post-Condition Surveys – Comprehensive site documentation before and after construction works, helping mitigate risk and resolve disputes.

AI & Drone-Powered Facade Inspections – High-resolution drone imaging combined with artificial intelligence to identify cracks, defects, and deterioration on building exteriors quickly and safely.

3D Volumetric Stockpile Measurement – Accurate and cost-effective analysis of earthworks and material stockpiles using drone photogrammetry and LiDAR-based techniques.

We combine traditional surveying accuracy with cutting-edge tools like UAVs (drones), AI-based analysis, and 3D modelling to help construction professionals reduce downtime, increase safety, and improve project oversight.

At Xpress Surveys, we’re not just measuring — we’re enhancing how the built environment is monitored, documented, and understood.

description:

description:
For 25 years, we've witnessed the critical financial impact of overlooked contractual terms, particularly within the construction sector. Many Small and Medium Enterprise (SME) contractors, driven by the immediate goal of securing projects, inadvertently accept conditions that lead to significant losses, cash flow issues, and even bankruptcy. 

At Contracts Mastery, we bridge this crucial knowledge gap. We provide expert guidance to SME contractors, meticulously evaluating tender documents and existing contracts to identify hidden risks and opportunities. Our comprehensive services include in-depth contract reviews, robust cost and cash flow reporting, and strategic business risk management advice. 

We also offer targeted training programs to equip your team with essential contractual knowledge. Through convenient online and face-to-face meetings, we empower your business to negotiate stronger terms, safeguard your profitability, and achieve superior results on cost, time, and quality. 

Don't let unfavorable contracts jeopardize your success – let Contracts Mastery turn your contractual challenges into strong, profitable outcomes.

Contact us for following Services:
a)	Contract/Tender review
b)	Setting up Change Control procedure for the companies
c)	Provide Financial Reports like Cost Reports and Cashflow reports
d)	Provide training on Contract Management awareness.
e)	Quantity Take-off for tenders and construction projects
f)	Building Information Modeling (“BIM”) services

description:

With advances in smartphone technology, it is now possible to design not just the physical space but also the virtual. The result is better site and user understanding, which drives better decisions and design solutions.  

iSight emerged from a established multidisciplinary team of  consultants including architects, landscape architects and hydraulic engineers, the catalyst for livable public spaces that integrates natural systems. 

By combining our expertise with iSight, we extend our expertise in designing performative landscapes using digital tools, creating tech-enabled landscapes that not only excites, but informs and adapts to evolving needs.

description:
RBS GROUP serves government and multi national corporations with customised and turnkey projects in various sectors and industries.  Working with German technologies and international brands with 100 years of history, RBS provides design, development and manufacturing of an extensive and comprehensive range of building solutions, tents, halls and large span structures in the fields of special events, industry, civil defense and military operations at the highest levels of quality, service and aftersales.  
 
RBS solutions are supported by our production plants in Germany, France, Italy, US and China.    Our expertise in these sectors is a result of bespoke patented designs and the highest standards of manufacturing, well-trained and experienced craftsmen and the use of the finest quality of materials. Many RBS structures are also designed for government and humanitarian disaster relief and can be rapidly deployed to provide fast and effective protection to people and valuable equipment.  

In the event of an national or civil emergency or where there is a requirement for immediate deployment, RBS offers global solutions, from an initial design proposal, to supply, installation and, if required, maintenance. Almost all of our products have a NATO stock number.  In addition to stand-alone structures, we can also offer full turnkey and bespoke facilities and solutions for Headquarters / Command Posts, Field Hospitals,  Storage Hangars, CBRN and Decontamination systems. 

As the world‘s leading manufacturers and renters of temporary and portable clearspan structures, our solution range offers a variety of span widths from 3m to 60m, with aesthetically enhancing modular architectural features, which can create exclusive, affordable designs. These include system flooring, cassette wall panels, double-wing doors and impressive glass facing. Our unique roof design of 5m by 5m modules with pitched roofs, in one- or two-storey structures, offers unlimited widths and lengths. A perfect multi-purpose structure for showrooms, storage, logistics, grandstand covers, exhibitions, garages, re-locatable airport terminals, stores or any other application. 

RBS's containerised solutions today are widely used in the construction industry as Pre-fabricated Pre-finished Volumetric Modular Construction (PPVC) technology. With a large production capacity, our container solutions has become one of the most prominent providers of the modern construction industry. The container modules are based on the ISO standard container developed in-house and are equipped according to their use: from the simple accommodation container to the high-tech modules used in different variants for representation, sales or administration, for childcare and teaching as well as for geriatrics and medicine. It meets all the requirements for high-quality, sustainable and economic building. 
 
RBS is present in all markets in which modular building has established itself as an alternative to conventional building, in the municipal sector, for building nurseries, schools and canteens in medical and retirement facilities, in industry, for building offices, porters' lodges and training centres, in trade and handcraft, for building sales pavilions in the food sector and in the car and retail trade. Building work in these areas has to observe the applicable guidelines for noise protection and fire protection as well as those on the use of renewable energy. Not only does RBS meet these requirements, we works continuously on the technical and formal development of its modules. 

For more information, visit www.rbsgroup.com.sg

company_name: Universal Building Solutions International Pte Ltd
description:
Home affordability for the average person is becoming no more than a dream, as construction costs continue to spiral out of control across the entire building industry, be it residential, commercial or industrial properties the story is always the same, costs are on the increase and becoming less affordable for the majority of people.

Not only is construction affordability rising beyond reach for the masses its becoming increasingly difficult for developers, construction and building companies to make reasonable profits. High cost for labor and building materials has an effect at every level in the industry from the developer, builder, right through to the end user.

We have all see projects that are uncompleted because the developer or builder has run out of funding, completed buildings unoccupied or unsold simply because people cannot afford to lease or buy these buildings due to their high cost of construction.
   
UBSI has developed a new construction method utilizing advanced building technology ("Integrated Building System" IBS) and innovative construction materials which will provide structurally superior, faster build, energy efficient, and environmentally friendly buildings.
 
The technology that's been developed is a exceptional building solution package that combats all of the issues confronting the construction industry and the end consumer markets. UBSI has developed its technology into a complete package, addressing many of the issues mentioned above as well as environmental issues associated with in the construction Industry throughout our world today.

Our system targets both the manufacturing of building materials and how these materials are used within the construction process itself. This new advanced building system is not only superior, reducing build times by up to 70%, it's also extremely cost effective, affording savings on construction starting at around 30% to 50% below normal conventional building costs.

Delivering buildings that are structurally stronger, energy efficient and environmentally friendly. Any competent Architect, Engineer or Construction professional can easily understand this Technology as its internal structure works on the well known principals of column and beam construction.
Advancements with our technology has made the system so easy to use that even semi & non skilled workers can construct buildings with ease, which will reduce the cost of construction by limiting the amount of man hours expensive tradesmen are required on site.

description:
ARCHITECTS REGIONAL COUNCIL ASIA (ARCASIA) LTD. consists of the Presidents of National Institutes of Architects in Asia.

2026-2027
President-Elect : Ar. Prof Dr Wu Jiang (ASC)
Chairman ACAE: Ar. Umar Sayeed (IAP)
Chairman ACPP: Ar. Lim Choon Keang (SIA) 
Chairman ACSR: Ar. Vanessa Ledesma (UAP)
Chairman ACGSA: Ar.Tan Szue Hann (SIA)
Chairman ACYA: Ar. Qhawarizmi Norhisham (PAM)

The organization itself serves as an extension of each member institutes’ regional program and relations.

Annual meetings are held to deliberate on, give collective direction and representation to matters that affect the architectural profession in the Asian region.

Objectives
To unite on a democratic basis and to foster friendly, intellectual, artistic, educational and scientific ties among National Institutes of Architects in the Asian Region.
To foster and maintain professional contacts, mutual cooperation and assistance among Member Institutes.
To represent architectural institutes of member countries at Inter-Regional level.
To promote the development and education of architects to serve society.
To promote research and technical advancement in the field of the built environment.
To provide a forum for member Institutes, government agencies and allied professional organizations for the discussion of problems of common interest and seek solutions to these problems which would contribute to the advancement of the profession and the development of Architecture relevant to the culture and aspirations of the Asian people.
To establish direct linkages between ARCASIA and other regional organizations, government agencies of Asian region, agencies of the United Nations Organization, inter-regional associations and transnational corporations for interchanges of technical and scientific matters between countries and regional organizations; and acquiring assistance in promoting the objectives of ARCASIA as representing the Regional Council for Asian architects.

description:
At BIM ProBuild, we specialize in revolutionizing the construction industry through cutting-edge Building Information Modeling (BIM) solutions. With a steadfast commitment to innovation and excellence, we empower construction projects of all scales to achieve enhanced efficiency, sustainability, and cost-effectiveness.


Who We Are

Founded on the principles of technological advancement and industry expertise, BIM Probuild has emerged as a leader in BIM services. Our team comprises skilled professionals who blend creativity with technical prowess to deliver comprehensive BIM solutions tailored to meet the unique needs of each client.


What We Do

We offer a full spectrum of BIM services, including:

BIM Modeling: Accurate and detailed 3D modeling for architectural, structural, MEP (Mechanical, Electrical, Plumbing), and infrastructure components.
Clash Detection and Coordination: Streamlining project coordination and minimizing clashes through advanced clash detection tools.
Construction & As-built Drawings: Produce detailed drawings from the coordinated 3D model according to the project specifications.
Quantity Takeoff and Cost Estimation: Precise material quantities and cost estimates derived from BIM models.
4D and 5D BIM: Adding the dimensions of time (4D) and cost (5D) to BIM models for enhanced project scheduling and budgeting.


Why Choose Us

Expertise: Our team consists of BIM specialists with extensive experience across various industries.
Innovation: We stay ahead with the latest BIM technologies and methodologies.
Client-Centric Approach: Each project is approached with a focus on understanding client objectives and delivering measurable results.
Quality Assurance: Rigorous quality checks ensure accuracy and reliability in every deliverable.


Get in Touch

Explore the future of construction with BIM ProBuild. Contact us today to discuss how our BIM services can transform your next project.

description:
Archibazaar is the south east asia's first collective online platform for architects, manufacturers, suppliers and practitioners of the architecture and construction industry.

Through Archibazaar’s interactive portal, we aim to increase your brand visibility to key decision makers of the industry.  With available products all located in one place, it will simplify the specifying process while also being a common platform for users and vendors to interact, acquire information and share expertise.

For architects and designers, Archibazaar is the most ideal way to publicise your work, find inspiration and source for products. The online platform allows for projects to be viewed from multiple angles, from the manufacturers’ to the architects’ as well as from other consultants, making it the richest and most complete platform for architecture and design supplies. 

Additionally, the website provides continuous information for a vast community of architects searching for the latest industry updates. These can include project highlights, products, events, interviews and competitions.

Mission : Our key aim is to produce the latest and relevant expert information from key industry players and to distribute it across the Archibazaar community of architects, designers, researchers, manufacturers and suppliers, building a cohesive platform for the exchange of ideas and shared data.

description:
Haus Design And Build Pte Ltd is Singapore Premier Design & Build Contractor and Interior Design Renovator.

Website: https://hausdesignandbuild.com

Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/HausDesignAndBuildPteLtd

Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/hausdesignandbuildpteltd

Z Lim 林伟志 is a veteran with deep domain knowledge and experience in the Singapore Building Construction Industry. He had successfully completed many projects for Property Developers, Hotels, Houses Owners and Corporate Clients with the support of our experience team of workers, sub-contractors, suppliers, vendors, architects, professional engineers, quantity surveyors, interior designers and landscape designers etc.

Haus Design And Build Pte Ltd is a General Contractor, Building Construction including major upgrading works and Renovation Contractor. We have a Singapore Builder’s License for General Builder issued by the Singapore Building and Construction Authority (BCA).

We had obtained certificates for The Workplace Safety and Health Council bizSAFE Level STAR Certificate, ISO 9001 Quality Management System, ISO 14001 Environmental Management System, OHSAS 18001 and SS506 Occupation Health & Safety Management System.

Our company had implemented Risk Management at works sites and conduct weekly tool box meetings with workers and sub-contractors to ensure site safety.

We are capable to undertake all Design & Build New Erection Works, Re-Construction Works, Additions & Alterations Works (A&A) and Interior Renovation Works from commencement to completion at reasonable rates and time.

We Specialize for Commercial, Residential and Hotel Projects:

1. One-Stop Solution Turnkey Design & Build Construction.

2. Architecture.

3. Quantity Surveyor.

4. Civil & Structural Engineering.

5. M&E Consultancy Works.

6. Additions & Alteration Works.

7. Building Maintenance Works.

8. Interior Design & Renovation Works.

9. Landscaping Design & Planting Works.

10. Project Consultant & Management.

description:
We, Brown Rock Pte Ltd was founded in Singapore by a group of experienced engineers in providing professional services in civil engineering, structural engineering and underground development. The organization established itself through its relentless pursuit to satisfy the customers through providing services which are innovative, cost effective and of high quality. Our key elements contributing in achieving our aim are:

 	Strong expertise governing “Construction & Environmental Systems” in our projects,
 	Planning of works adopting “Value Engineering” concepts,
 	Personalized services with Clients, &
 	Bridging and pairing the right resources for the right projects.

3 decades of experience in various projects undertaken in Singapore as follows:

 	MRT station Construction,
 	TBM & MTBM Bored Tunnels,
 	Cut and Cover Tunnels,
 	Water treatment Plant,
 	Desalination plant,
 	Ground Improvement works,
 	Chemical factory projects,
 	Deep Sewer Tunnel projects,
 	Pipe Jacking works & Underpinning works,
 	High Rise building Construction, &
 	Steel structure works.
 	CCTV inspection and Reports

The organisation had expanded to provide the following engineering services and solutions to major clients in India (Mumbai & Delhi) in underground developments projects such as deep shaft construction and micro-tunnelling works:

 	Hard rock boring techniques,
 	Ground improvement methods,
 	Engineering study and recovery of Sewer tunnels at Delhi,
 	Live sewer channel crossing tunnel construction adopting NATM method,
 	Pre-bidding consultancy services, & 
 	Feasibility study for Deep Sewer Tunnel at Mumbai.

description:
Microcell Marketing (Asia) Pte Ltd is a Singapore-based marketing company with R&D facilities and factories based in Taiwan.
Microcell is dedicated to the promotion of eco-friendly building materials for the betterment of our future generations. Believing only in offering the best quality products that are not only eco-friendly but also sustainable through unceasing R&D efforts.

Our strong belief in sustainability is demonstrated not only in our flagship product, CellWood, it is also a way of life that is reflected in the way we conduct our business and the way we run our operations.

We share our accumulated industry experience with our customers through our professional knowledge and capabilities in the utilisation of CELLwood to help our client succeed in the rapidly changing global market.

At Microcell, we promote sustainability through conscious and practical efforts that are environmentally friendly in the way we conduct our business and operations.
Microcell stands at the forefront of eco-friendly material development to bring new sustainable building materials to fruition for our future generations.
Microcell endeavours to promote environmental protection principles in our dealings with our vendors, suppliers and customers through direct efforts in our production processes and/or by helping downstream manufacturers indirectly to conserve energy and counter deforestation.
Microcell wants to encourage the reduction in deforestation through R&D and the manufacturing of Eco- Friendly, Non-Toxic and Recyclable wood-alternative materials.

Microcell aims to be a major supplier of wood-alternative materials in the long run by adopting multi-faceted, sustainable and eco-friendly policies in the research and development, manufacturing, marketing, distribution and utilisation of our line of products and services in the building industry.

description:
Welcome to SM Construction & Engineering Pte. Ltd.! 

We’re not just about building—we’re about creating spaces you love. With over 200 happy clients and counting, we’ve built a reputation for delivering top-quality results and exceptional service.

Here’s what we bring:

 Renovation Services – Ready for a change? We’ll transform your space to fit your style and needs. 
 Painting Services – Fresh coats and vibrant colors that make your property pop. 
 Plumbing Services – Reliable fixes and installations to keep your water systems flowing smoothly. 
 Electrical Services – Safe, efficient solutions for all your electrical needs. 
 Hacking and Demolition – Preparing your site for new projects with precision and care. 
 Ceiling Partition Services – Create versatile, functional spaces with our expert partition solutions. 
 Waterproofing – Protect your property from water damage with our advanced waterproofing methods. 
 Structural Repair Works – Restoring safety and stability to your building with our thorough repairs.
 Roofing Services & Solutions – Whether it’s a repair or a new installation, we’ve got your roof covered.

description:
Pu Hua International was set up in 1996 with the goal of creating environment-friendly and health-conscious building and commercial products. 
As much as our lifestyle is modern, our living surroundings should be as natural as possible. Free of harmful chemicals and completely safe for the whole family. Purer, cleaner, fresher air quality at home is the foundation where this all begins.
To effectively combat indoor pollution, we invested in more than a decade’s worth of research and certified lab testing. The result is the highly innovative and immensely beneficial ‘Diatomite Air Purifying Wall Coating’ – a wall coating which harnesses powerful absorbency and 100% natural properties of Diatomaceous Earth to ‘breathe’ in pollutants and purify indoor air quality. 
Blending technology and natural science together, Pu Hua aims to pioneer and be a market leader in green building products.

description:
Welcome to GreenMix Commodities, a pioneering force dedicated to transforming the construction industry through sustainable practices and innovative solutions. With a rich history in the construction and mining sectors, we leverage our extensive experience to address environmental challenges and drive positive change.

*Our Mission*
At GreenMix Commodities, our mission is to innovate and deliver responsible construction solutions that harness the potential of upcycled sidestreams. We are committed to minimizing waste, reducing carbon footprints, and maintaining high ethical and environmental standards throughout our operations.

*What We Do*
We specialize in upcycling industrial by-products into eco-friendly building materials, significantly reducing the dependency on landfills and conserving natural resources. Our solutions include advanced formulations that lower CO2 emissions and enhance the durability and performance of construction materials.

*Our Approach*
Through partnerships with leading institutions like the National University of Singapore and the Centre for Advanced 2D Materials, we develop cutting-edge technologies to repurpose by-products from various industries. Our comprehensive methodology includes project scoping, thorough research and analysis, commercial evaluations, and support for pilot projects and scaling production.

*Sustainability Commitment*
Sustainability is at the core of our operations. We prioritize reducing landfill impact, lowering the carbon footprint of construction activities, and ensuring responsible practices across our supply chain. Our commitment extends beyond compliance, fostering transparency, fairness, and environmental stewardship in all aspects of our business.

Join us on our journey to build a sustainable future together, where waste becomes a valuable resource and environmental responsibility drives industry innovation.

For more information, visit our website or contact us at netzero@greenmixcommodities.com.

description:
Team of project managers and planners specializing on retail space planning for concessions in Airports, with past projects in 15 countries serviced with offices and associates based locally. 

Our professionals are equipped with extensive industry careers and have wide experience in conducting senior level concession planning & project implementation assignments. 

We have deep knowledge of Airports in Asia and experience from a broad range of Categories and currently employed by Clients with Global outreach. 

CAPABILITIES 
Pre-Tender survey & analysis, feasibility report, preliminary yield on space distribution studies 
Development of concept Brief 
Concept Design 
Categories and merchandising programming 
Architectural & Technical schematics 
Projects Management 
Brands management 
Procurement & Costs Management 

 Travel Retail Expansion Programs 
TSP takes part in travel retail programs in Asia, and covers the entire spectrum, from concept development to schematics and rollouts. 
With TSP as a partner, not only can operators expect significant project commitments, they benefit also from the relationship with one of this region’s leading project management practitioners. Access to a large regional network of top store design, project management and construction specialists which in today’s rapid growth environment is a valuable feature. Duty Free operators and brand Owners can use on this for their advantage. Furthermore, TSP commonly supports its assignments by deciding strategic design and effective interpretation programs when implementing each individual project assignment. 

  
Programs Profile 
TSP manages in project development program across Asia, both in the developed 1st Tier and the secondary 2nd Tier retail programs, classified by mppas. In addition, TSP is also active around co-design management for developments in Asia, whereby TSP develop schematics alongside Lead Designers/Architects based in US, Europe, or any Oceania region.

description:
ChangeWorq is an independent Workplace Strategy & Change Management Consultancy.  We are a data driven practice, helping our clients re-invent how their staff work, defining the optimal mix of spaces to enable more effective business results

Think of us as a consultancy that focuses on “How it Works” rather than the traditional design focused approach of “How it Looks” 

Through our strategy work, we help our clients align their workplace to their organisational strategy, brand and culture.  We create spaces that empower and energise your people and increase the value derived from your real estate investment.  By modelling the impact of workplace change and headcount growth, we can future-proof your workplace and create a space that helps you become an employer of choice 

It’s very common for new office projects to be dominated by basic real estate and space planning metrics.  As important as these are, if you want to achieve the best outcome, we need to unpack what your business is trying to achieve and how spacial change can enable greater efficiency in the use of space + improved effectiveness of your people.
It’s vital to start from defining business needs and then progress to the design and layout.  This is the only way to deliver a great design outcome that really connects to the business and the people working within it

Measuring how work varies both across and within teams helps staff to get beyond their perceptions and fear of change.  Using data to inform these conversations means you can have a far more productive discussion on what might be possible

ChangeWorq’s analytical tools and techniques enable us to create the right mix of work-settings as well as helping your staff along the Change journey – a vital part of the programme to gain traction and ensure future scalability

description:
Since 1974, Building Associates (S) Pte Ltd has been at the forefront of providing building works services for a diverse range of industrial and residential projects. Our enduring legacy is a testament to the unwavering loyalty and dedication we bring to our customers. By offering expert advice and delivering excellent after-sales assistance, we continually strive to ensure the satisfaction of our clients, building lasting relationships founded on trust and quality service.

Having played a pivotal role in numerous industrial and residential ventures, our firm has garnered a well-deserved reputation for consistently delivering exceptional work at prices that resonate with value. At the heart of our operations lie comprehensive building solution services, with a specialized focus on the meticulous supply and installation of pitched roofing and facade elements.

In the area of pitched roofing, our expertise encompasses various types, with a predominant emphasis on metal roofing. We take pride in our discerning selection of materials, ensuring that they adhere to rigorous specifications. This commitment to precision extends to our supply and installation services for diverse facade work, where our proficiency shines, particularly in the application of Rockwool Sandwich Panels.

Our firm commitment to quality craftsmanship and cost-effectiveness positions us as a trusted partner in the realization of a wide spectrum of construction projects. Rooted in our dedication to client satisfaction and unwavering service standards, we continue to be a reliable choice for those seeking excellence in building solutions.

Services:
Being a total solution service provider in the building and construction industry, Building Associates provides works and services in the following areas:
-	Metal Roofing
-	Pitch Roofing
-	Cladding (specializes in Rockwool Sandwich Panels)
-	Louvers
-	Curtain Wall
-	Fall Arrest Systems

description:
Cool N Lite Solar Film Pte Ltd was established in 2002. The branding and quality of Cool N Lite has received recognition from leading automotive and building developers in Singapore as well as the region. Over the years, the company has built a strong team of well-trained and disciplined pool of certified applicators to provide highest standard of workmanship with reliability. Some of our notable clientele include the Singapore Police Force, Changi Airport, Sentosa Cove Development, Mass Rapid Transport Corporation, Ministry of Defense, Resorts World Sentosa, Singapore Aerospace, Republic of Singapore Navy and many other commercial and residential developments. Our films also come highly recommended and applied in the high-end automotive sector with leading marks like Maserati, Lamborghini, Ferrari, BMW and Jaguar.  

As demand intensifies for high tech films in new developments, new technologies are introduced to meet modern requirements from leading architects. These new technologies feature spectrally selective rejection capabilities enabling occupants to enjoy maximum visible light transmission while rejecting a massive amount of solar energy (heat) which was traditionally challenging.

Our range of high tech films are tested by recognized product testing, inspection and certification agencies like TÜV SÜD PSB Pte Ltd. These test reports and product certification marks are well accepted by manufacturers, third party buyers and government authorities worldwide.

description:
The firm was first established in 1999 as HIL Architects (with association to Twinwood Designs). It was renamed HILADT Architects LLP when it was changed to a limited liability partnership in 2005. The principal partners are Lim Hseng Iu and Raymond Sim.

HILADT Architects LLP is listed under the Building and Construction Authority’s Public Sector Panels of Consultants (PSPC) – Panel AR03.

description:

We want to explore the Why nots and What IFs to realise new possibilities.
We are in the business of telling stories through spaces.

Let us tell yours.

description:
Singapore Waterproofing Specialist provides reliable waterproofing services for homes and buildings in Singapore. As a trusted waterproofing contractor, we back our work with a 12-month warranty. We use advanced techniques to protect your property from water damage, delivering solutions to stop leaks and prevent water-related problems effectively. We're committed to high-quality work with long-lasting results. Whether you need waterproofing for your roof, walls, basement, bathroom & toilet, kitchen, balcony, water tank, swimming pool, or wet areas, we have the expertise to help. Our company operates as 3M Builders Private Limited (ACRA UEN: 201419587N). Contact us today for expert waterproofing solutions and to protect your property.
Singapore Waterproofing Specialist provides expert waterproofing services. We serve both homes and commercial buildings across Singapore. Our goal is to protect your property from water damage.

We specialize in many waterproofing needs. This includes roofs (flat, metal, tiled), basements, and wet areas like bathrooms and kitchens. We also waterproof balconies, terraces, external walls, and foundations. We handle water tanks, swimming pools, and planter boxes too.

We are experts in fixing leaks. Our team performs precise water leak detection and repair. We offer grouting and injection services for cracks. We also do crack line repair. Flood infusion treatment is another advanced solution we provide.

We use various high-quality waterproofing methods. These include waterproof membranes, polyurethane (PU) grouting, epoxy coatings, and fiberglass systems. All our work is backed by a 12-month warranty. You can trust us for high-quality work and long-lasting results. Contact us for reliable waterproofing solutions.

description:
Calm Authority: Building Clarity in a World of Noise

When I first started Homeone, I thought success meant knowing everything — mastering every trade detail, every regulation, every customer interaction.

Over time, I discovered something far more powerful: mastering myself.

Today, when people ask what truly drives Homeone’s strength, my answer is simple — Calm Authority.

In Singapore’s service industry — especially plumbing and electrical — chaos is normal.
Everyone has an opinion, a shortcut, or a cheaper way.

I used to argue, explain, and persuade endlessly.
But arguments don’t build progress — systems do.

Now I remind myself daily:

“My energy belongs to progress, not correction.”

That shift changed everything — from how I lead people to how I choose who deserves my time.

My years in Far East Organization taught me the art of precision.
Ambiguity was punished immediately — a wrong drawing, a missed measurement, a vague commitment.
That environment built in me a deep respect for ownership.

You don’t wait for reminders. You take charge. You deliver.

Yet years later, I saw many ex-colleagues — once commanding boardrooms — lost after leaving the structure that made them appear strong.

That’s when I realised:
Most people learn precision from enforcement, not conviction.
When the system disappears, so does their clarity.

People sometimes mistake calm for weakness.
But calm authority isn’t silence — it’s selective response.

I will not argue.
I will not rescue.
I will stay clear, firm, and calm.
My energy belongs to progress, not correction.

This is my daily mantra — in meetings, customer disputes, even family life.
Because clarity is contagious. Hold it long enough, and it changes how others behave around you.

Precision, Ownership & Automation.
At Homeone, our engineers and digital systems follow the same philosophy.
We don’t just fix pipes or wires — we build accountable workflows.

description:
Founded in 1988, Aquatech Products & Services has grown from a humble swimming pool specialist contractor to one of the top leaders in Singapore's water leisure industry today. Aquatech's services include designing and building swimming pool filtration systems, water treatment, spa pool systems, sauna & steam room systems, water feature systems, fish pond biological filtration systems, water play structures, and pool maintenance. Our expertise has expanded the company to regional projects since early 1990's, completing projects in Malaysia, Vietnam, Myanmar, Indonesia, and Cambodia.


Accreditation & Certifications
Aquatech is consistently at the forefront of new global technology and market innovations. We are registered with the Building and Construction Authority of Singapore and has achieved ISO 9001:2000, BS OHSAS 18001:2007 and bizSAFE Level Star certifications. Aquatech has also been elected to be a member of the Water Quality Association USA and the National Spa and Pool Institute USA.

Awards and Recognition
2015 Singapore 1000 SME Award

2011 Singapore 1000 SME Award

We specialise in providing retractable awning installations in Singapore. From home renovations to addition and alterations projects, we offer a full range of awning units best suited for your home. Retractable awnings allow users to maximise their usage of backyard and outdoor space by providing much needed shade. Our glass, metal, and other canopy units have also proven that they can enhance the appeal of your garden and outdoor spaces.

description:
Speed Cool Engineering Services Pte Ltd is a leading provider of air conditioning solutions, proudly serving the marine, commercial, private, and HDB sectors across Singapore. With a deep understanding of the unique challenges in each of these environments, we offer tailored services that meet the highest standards of performance and reliability.

Marine Sector: Our expertise extends to the marine industry, where we provide specialized air conditioning services for vessels of all sizes. We understand the demanding conditions at sea and ensure that our systems are built to withstand the rigors of marine environments, delivering comfort and efficiency even in the toughest conditions.

Commercial Sector: For commercial properties, we offer comprehensive air conditioning solutions designed to support businesses of all sizes. From office buildings to retail spaces, we deliver systems that optimize energy efficiency, reduce operational costs, and maintain a comfortable environment for employees and customers alike.

Private Sector: We cater to the specific needs of private clients, offering personalized air conditioning solutions for homes and luxury residences. Whether it’s a new installation or regular maintenance, we ensure that our clients enjoy the perfect indoor climate, with systems that are both effective and discreet.

HDB Sector: With extensive experience in the HDB sector, we are well-versed in the unique requirements of public housing in Singapore. Our team is dedicated to providing reliable, cost-effective air conditioning services that enhance the living conditions of HDB residents, ensuring cool and comfortable homes year-round.

At Speed Cool, we combine technical expertise with a commitment to customer satisfaction, making us the go-to choice for all your air conditioning needs. Connect with us to discover how we can keep your environment cool and comfortable, no matter the setting.

description:
K. A. Builders Construction Pte Ltd or “K. A. Builders” was established in 1987 with core competency in application of Vermiculite coating onto structural steel for fire protection.

 

Furthering the founder’s aim of creating a one-stop passive fire protection specialist, K. A. Builders has expanded to include related passive fire protection products and services into the business.

 

Riding on the company’s strong belief in achieving total customer satisfaction, the company’s team continually explores new technological systems and experiments with a multitude of products and materials to achieve a high level of efficiency, creativity, project management and quality control.

 

Today K.A. Group Holdings Pte Ltd consists of the following

 

K. A. Building Construction Pte LtdK. A. Fireproofing Pte Ltd
K. A. Fabric Shutters Pte Ltd
K. A. Firelite Pte Ltd
K. A. Vermiculite Spray Sdn Bhd

The Company, together with its group of companies (the “Group”), is a one-stop provider of fire protection products and services and one of the few players in the Singapore’s construction industry that is both a manufacturer and applicator of such solutions.

description:
EQT Yard is a secure end-to-end online marketplace platform for construction assets like used heavy equipment, spare parts and building materials. We aim to empower businesses with efficient digital solutions to improve productivity and liquidity by allowing sellers to list their used heavy equipment and buyers to browse what our users have to offer.

Founded in 2020, our aim as a solutions provider is to maximize efficiency, optimize procurement and establish better connections within the construction industry so businesses can construct and build bigger, better and more sustainably. Supported by decades of experience in the construction industry and in heavy equipment trading, we dream of making a positive difference in the world. 

Our innovative digital platform improves cash flow and efficiency by allowing businesses to list and trade their assets and products , sell surplus stock , call for tenders or bid on tenders and access Easy Financing and Hassle-Free Delivery services all online. On top of that, we streamlined the procurement process to preserve the simplicity of an online shopping experience so our users can navigate and use these services easily. Here at EQT Yard, we are committed to helping businesses of all sizes adapt and grow.

Find us at:

description:
Our passion for racks started in 1999 when we realized that many organizations were facing a space crunch, having to house numerous numbers of sensitive equipment within the confines of a small area. So our team of engineers went to work on how we could effectively maximize space to ensure that there’s a place for everything and that everything is in its place. 

The first concern was to design compact, self-serving enclosures. The second was to ensure that sensitive equipment can be safeguarded. The third was to ensure that the enclosures are aesthetically pleasing. The result is the Cybermax Enclosure designed and manufactured with the client’s needs in mind – space saving, good looking, all-contained-within-one enclosure.

Every Rack starts with a good design. Our wealth of experience lies in the design and manufacture of rack cabinets and enclosure Wall Mounted Cabinets, Open Frame Racks, LAN Workstations, Consoles, Standard Rack Mount Cabinets to our latest – the world’s first SOHO – Small Office, Home Office Enclosure.

For any successful implementation to take place, vital support in both pre and post sales activities is crucial in cementing customer satisfaction. Cybermax’s customers can rest assured that they’ll enjoy peace of mind with Cybermax Enclosures designed to enhance the efficiency and productivity of any organization, consuming minimal space through its ergonomic design and excellent spatial management, making them the preferred choice.

We can also meet your needs and specifications for customized cabinets and enclosures. Reputed for our uncompromising standards and quality, our Enclosures find application in almost every sector of industry from Telecommunications, Computer Networking, Logistics, Defence to Media Broadcast Corporations.

description:

We are sure of meeting the requirements of our customers with over 20 years of experience in the manufacturing , installation and innovation of doors and shutters.

A main hallmark of Unity has been research and growth. We uphold our founder ‘s legacy of strongly believing in innovation and developing new products and technologies that comply with local laws and regulations, represent the changing times, the quests of customers for innovation , creativity, simplicity, and other practical considerations.

description:
With over 15 years of experience we have established a reputation as one of the highest quality builders in Singapore. In Sky Renovation you are promised a fully professional organisation, ensuring peace of mind in developing your potential investment.

The Sky Renovation team comprises committed constructors, merchants, and experts who have solutions for the construction and design. We strive to build beautiful remodels for our customers that combine feature, aesthetics and viability with great care.

Choosing us to design and build your extension, means that you have chosen one of the most recognised and highly acclaimed builders in the industry. Since our launch in 2002, Sky has quickly developed into the leader in home renovations. Our processes and systems make it easy for homeowners to have an affordable and low-stress renovation experience.

We grew out of a desire to provide homeowners with a practical solution to their renovation woes. Before Sky existed, the typical renovation experience included disorganised schedules, blown budgets and homeowners all but pulling their hair out from the stress of trying to manage it all on their own.

Today, we have managed home renovations for over 1,000 homeowners, using our bespoke design and build process. We take care of every stage of your renovation for you; including design, costings, council consents, scheduling, construction and decorating. With us, completing renovations on time and on budget isn’t the exception, it’s the expectation.

description:
ZSEAL MARKETING 
We offer a wide range of grouting / waterproofing, concrete repair products to repair the leaking of concrete caused by porous and honeycombed concrete created during the casting process. 
Our main products are listed below and the complete product range, complete with detailed product brochures can be found on our website www.zseal.com.sg.
ZSEAL SINGLE COMPONENT POLYURETHANE GROUT (mainly smaller leaks)
Description:
Zseal Single Component Polyurethane Grout is a hydrophobic grout based on MDI polyurethane. It has a very fast reaction time when it comes into contact with water; it starts to expand very quickly and creates a stable impermeable mass which stops leaks within a very short period of time. As a single component product no catalyst is required and the product can be injected by grouting pump directly from the container, however reaction times might be too slow for heavy leaks.
ZSEAL POLYURETHANE GROUT WITH CATALYST (heavy leaks)
Description:
Zseal Polyurethane Grout (PU) with catalyst is also a hydrophobic grout based on MDI polyurethane, but comes with an additional component in the form of a reaction controlling catalyst. Zseal PU combined with varying amounts of the catalyst can react immediately when introduced to water and expands in volume by up to 30 times its’ original volume to create an impermeable, stable foam plug. Zseal PU is 100% solid and solvent free. Reaction time can be controlled and adjusted by the addition of Zseal catalyst, however caution must be taken by new operators otherwise the application grouting pumps can become blocked.
TECHNICAL PRODUCT AND SPECIALIZED APPLICATION EQUIPMENT SUPPORT
In addition to our products, we have established an in-house technical team allowing Zseal to provide both pre-sales (on site assistance, product presentations) and after sales services. Zseal provides a complete range of grout/foam application equipment combined with an efficient repair and maintenance workshop.

description:
Ethos
Our company was founded on the principles of interior design being an extension of one’s personality, lifestyle and aspirations.
We look forward to each brand new day with one goal in mind - to be the inception point for better lives through positive transformation of living and work spaces for our clients. Our projects are the physical manifestation of our ethos, delivered on the basis of industrial expertise and professionalism, fused with concept and construction.
Our philosophy is that design should not be confined to just visuals, but complete sensory immersion of aural, touch, and human emotion.

SERVICES
Interior Design
Interior design is a multi-dimensional discipline. From space planning, to material choice, and lighting, no single element can function on its own. Instead, all elements are involved in a constant interplay with each other – and our job as the interior designer is to strike a harmonious balance between each of them.

Renovation
Materialization of concepts and design plans is more than just fabrication and installation work. Throughout the entire renovation process, high levels of quality assessments, and material integrity testing is performed to ensure that every joint, mounting and structure exceed their expected performance levels.

Turnkey projects
We provide Ready-For-Occupancy (RFO) solutions by working closely with property developers and managements, and understanding their tenancy mix. This enables occupants to significantly minimize their downtime after the initial move-in stage.

Addition & Alteration Works (A&A)
Through strategic planning, innovative design and space usage, we enable clients to realize the full potential of their property. Whether it be repurposing of an existing space, or additions to your current property, we have the expertise to deliver and ensure that the job is done with the highest safety and structural standards.

description:
Angleworx is a Singapore incorporated company and a member of the JD Group. They specialize in acoustic interior, a combination of interior design and acoustic treatment.

Many believe that acoustics aren't important unless you are mixing, or recording or producing. Not only so, when it comes to good acoustically treated spaces, it means that there will not be an aesthetic appeal. This was the business opportunity Angleworx spotted.

Whether is it offices, conference rooms, training rooms, performing theaters, restaurants, home theaters, schools, hospitals, train stations, airports, or what not, they all share a common concern - acoustics. Popular to contrary belief, acoustics is actually important EVERYWHERE, and not just in recording studios. Many people have seem to realize that, but they just can't seem to know how plastic looking foams being slapped across every inch of the walls will give an aesthetic appeal to rooms that requires it.

By combining interior design with revolutionized acoustic products from Portugal and China, Angleworx aims to help our clients find the place where design and acoustics collide.

description:
WOWWOWWOW is a conceptual platform that champions creativity and artistic interactions between individuals and the world around them. Utilizing a multi-disciplinary approach through educational and co-creation discourses, it invites audiences of all ages to participate in its suite of educational and collaborative opportunities.

His works are exhibited internationally and collected by prominent art and cultural institutions and private individuals.

He has won a number of accolades locally and internationally, such as the Grand Prize, Philip Morris Group of Companies ASEAN Art Awards, the 1st Prize, UOB Painting of the Year Competition (Photography), the Japanese Chamber of Commerce and Industry Singapore Foundation Arts Award and the Interior Design Confederation Singapore (Service Industry) Award.  Interior & Finishing Systems

- Exclusive Durability System (multi-layer protection)

description:
We are an established A1 contractor in Singapore and have been in the construction industry since 1971. We are doing mainly government projects, like BTO, Main Upgrading, Lift Upgrading Projects & Nursing Homes. We have completed private building projects, e.g., factory.

Incorporated in 1971, LC&T Builder (1971) Pte Ltd has grown into a trusted name in the construction industry. Over the decades, we have applied our engineering expertise and project management capabilities to help our clients turn their visions into reality, delivering quality outcomes on time and within budget.

With a forward-looking approach, we have diversified upstream to include consulting and design services within our portfolio. Today, we are proudly registered with the Building and Construction Authority (BCA) as an A1 Grade contractor under the CW01 (General Building) workhead, enabling us to tender for public sector building projects of unlimited value.

Our continued growth is driven by dedicated teamwork, a strong commitment to quality, and a relentless focus on client satisfaction. Backed by a team of motivated professionals, experienced management staff, trusted partners, and highly skilled technical crews, we strive to complete every project to the highest industry standards.

At LC&T Builder, we embrace a culture of continuous improvement and believe that every success is a step toward raising the bar even higher. As we embark on our sustainability journey, we are committed to integrating ESG principles into our business practices, aligning our legacy of quality construction with Singapore’s vision for a greener and more sustainable built environment.

description:
Archtur is an architectural and interior design firm focused on crafting purposeful, people-centered spaces. 

Led by the principles of UX (user experience) design, Archtur’s holistic approach integrates the core aspects of space branding and sustainability in this design philosophy. This enables the firm to create meaningful spaces that anticipate and adapt to ever-evolving home and business spaces modern-day needs. Equipped with a multi-disciplinary network, Archtur enables Clients unified solutions of its design principles in architectural, interior design, and project management.

The commitment to delivering user-centric spaces is seen at the heart of the business; a dedication to rethink and rewrite the narrative of architecture, by embracing the future of spatial experiences. 

Constant (re)evaluation of the current spatial experiences and conceptualization of future lifestyle and/ or operational needs are fundamentals of client empathy. Identification of gaps & opportunities for change & innovation enables the execution of intrinsic iterations that create positive social impact and are key contributors to the success of Archtur’s projects.

Based in Singapore, the home-grown architectural practice is helmed by founder and principal architect Jonathan Lim, a registered architect in Singapore and a member of the Singapore Institute of Architects (SIA). 

Having served in the industry for over 20 years, Jonathan brings to each project a keen eye and deep expertise, with his broad experience across varying capacities as an architectural student, registered architect, contractor, and property developer. His transition to founding Archtur has allowed him to shape countless residential and commercial spaces, developing visions into reality, enriching lives along the way.

https://www.archtur.com.sg/privacypolicy

description:
Yong Hoe Enterprise is a fully local Singapore owned construction firm established in 1989. On 2nd January 1998,  Yong Hoe Enterprise Pte Ltd was incorporation and since then the company had been dealing with various kinds of construction works. 

Yong Hoe Enterprise Pte Ltd has been working closely with various reputed consultants to offer a quality end product to the Clients and Owners. The company has also successfully executed many projects such as residential, institutional, commercials, industrials and others by providing the best solution, design & services to our clients.

Over the years serving the community for nearly two decade, Yong Hoe Enterprise Pte Ltd still strive to provide a consistent quality works to the community by fully understanding the client’s needs and requirements . 

Yong Hoe Enterprise Pte Ltd pledge to be committed in building long-term relationships based on integrity, performance, value, and client satisfaction by gaining their trust through exceptional performance by every members of the construction team.

Yong Hoe Enterprise Pte Ltd understand that progress and improvement can only be achieved through the continued efforts, contribution and co-operation of each and every members of the company.  Therefore, the team must always keep in mind of the most important core values in construction

1. Uncompromising commitment to Quality, Health, Safety and Environment .

2. An open relationship with our employees based on mutual trust, respect and success .

3.Transparency, Accountability and Discipline in our business .

4. Best in class Risk Awareness .

5.Integrity in all we do.

6.  Competitive and reasonable price.

Incorporating these core values in our daily work, and making them an integral part of our culture, is key to our future success.


Quality Policy- Quality Workmanship with Zero Defects.


Quality Objective- At least 95% of project targeted to be completed on schedule. To achieve 75% and above customer satisfaction.

description:
Established in 1997, Shineway Engineering Pte Ltd has grown into a progressive organization with well performed operation. We are offering an extensive range of services and solutions to our valued customers. Our core services are Engineering and Construction with specialization in Façade Inspection & Rectification, Design & Build, Additions & Alterations, Repairs & Redecoration, Interior & graphic design, Floor Hardener & Epoxy Flooring as well as providing waterproofing & plumbing solutions. 

Shineway Engineering will be having in-house Drone Operation Team to focus on the visual inspection for facade. This digital transformation is significant to us as it is more cost effective & efficient compare to the traditional method. Besides that, with the PFI regime introduced by BCA, we aims to help building owners detect and address any facade deterioration in a timely manner thus ensuring public safety. 

Shineway Engineering is also looking into Green Building development, such as more comprehensive façade design, internal building renovation/refurbishment, HVAC System & renewable energy to achieve better energy savings & efficiency of a building in future.

description:
SGT Engineering Consultancy (SGT) is a Singapore based Civil and Structural engineering company providing professional engineering consultancy services. It is registered as a Licensed Corporation under Professional Engineers Board (PEB), specializing in Geotechnical and tunneling works. 

SGT's professional engineering services include analysis and design of different type of shafts, deep excavations, and bored tunnel segmental lining. Specialized services include TBM key operating parameter (KPI) comprising of TBM face pressure, shotcrete lining of cross passages, shotcrete lining of pump sumps in bored tunnel, a different type of NATM tunnels, supervision of construction of NATM tunnel, shafts as well as advice and recommendation for TBM operation and cutter head intervention.

SGT's team of experienced professionals has a wealth of experience in design, analysis and construction support in underground infrastructure and tunneling works. We are committed to delivering our services on time and with excellence.

description:
Décraft is a contractor specialising in providing highly quality interior and facade solutions to the world's leading luxury retailers. 
We specialize in designing and manufacturing custom-made & Singaporean Style Property. Most of our meetings and presentations will be done within our cosy little space. Our endeavor is to bring to homes, world class properties that stands apart for its quality, durability and meticulous design. Well thought out and global in its appeal, furniture designs are modern, straight lined and classic, with design influences from some of the most fascinating cities of the world.

Here at DeCraft Woodworks Co., we're equally invested in our signature designs and at the same time, constantly looking for fresh, new ideas from our clients. We brings you materials from all around the world, carefully curated for every design and style.

description:
Magnetite Singapore provides Noise Shields for existing windows which dramatically improves the comfort of a room, home or building by reducing noise transmission and increasing the energy efficiency of windows. We enable you to enjoy the benefits of double glazing in residential and commercial buildings without the need for lengthy renovation or business disruption.

Magnetite was developed by Kenneth J. Foster, an energy physicist, in conjunction with the M.I.T. Innovation Center. Mr. Foster was inspired by acrylic windows used on jet airplanes and the tight magnetic seals of refrigerator doors. He combined the concepts to create the patented Magnetite technology that allows you to receive all the benefits of double glazing without replacing your windows.

Magnetite Singapore Pte Ltd is part of the Magnetite Australia franchise network. Find out more about Magnetite Australia at http://www.magnetite.com.au.

description:
With over a decade of specialized experience, Hi-Tech Engineering & Constructions Pte. Ltd. is a trusted provider of comprehensive underground services detection solutions. Our team excels in accurately identifying and mapping underground utilities, ensuring the safe execution of construction projects.

We offer advanced underground services detection services, utilizing cutting-edge technologies to locate and trace vital infrastructure such as telecom and electrical cables. By delivering precise information about underground utilities, we empower clients to prevent damage and mitigate risks during their construction works.
In addition, we provide trial trenching services as a crucial first step before commencing any earthworks. Our meticulous approach involves physically identifying services and determining their alignment. This enables clients to gain a comprehensive understanding of the utilities present, allowing for informed decision-making and the implementation of proactive measures to protect underground infrastructure.
At Hi-Tech Engineering & Constructions Pte. Ltd., we understand the importance of proactive planning and the need to prevent disruptions to essential services. We are dedicated to delivering excellence, combining our wealth of experience with the latest industry practices to ensure the safety and success of our clients' projects.

description:
Many thanks for your valued time in visiting our Page.

We distribute various brands of Gas, Charcoal and Electric Grills. These includes Broil King Gas Grills - Canada, Outback Gas and Charcoal Grills - Australia, Cadac Charcoal Grills - South Arica, Dimplex Electric Grills - U.S.A.

We trust the information below would help answer most of your questions about the various Grills we can offer. 

All the above are very well known and popular brands in their respective countries and you can be assured its finish, quality and specifications will meet most of your grilling needs.

All Grills are sold on ex-stock basis and can be delivered within 1-2 working days on confirmation of your order.

We carry a host of accessories for your grilling needs the details of which can be seen under Grill Accessories.We also undertake servicing and repair of used Grills. All repairs are done on site. 

Being the first company to start selling Gas Grills in Singapore in 1990 under the brands of Sunbeam, Char Broil and Thermos of U.S.A. you can be rest assured of professional service to help you in your purchase. All products are covered under Warranty by their respective agents. You can thus have ease of mine in your purchase.

All Gas Grills are fitted with approved regulators and hose valued at S$ 85.00 FOC to enable these units to be used with locally approved LPG Tanks available from Local Gas Dealers.

All Grills are delivered Free and Fully Assembled within Singapore.

Export: Grills delivered in Original Box Packing. 

All prices are quoted net. No delivery, assembly or GST payable. However kindly note for grills that need be carried up a Roof Top by stairs, the agents may levy a small token sum for this service as they may need to deploy more personal for this delivery.

company_name: Tristars Engineering and Services Pte Ltd
description:
Introduction:
Established in 2011, Tristars Engineering and Services is a family-owned business based in Singapore. This independent services provider has grown to become a significant player in the local industry, offering a range of specialized services.

Services:
The company's primary offerings include Manpower Supply, Scaffolding, Ducting, Piping, and Electrical Services. These services are available across Singapore, with operations extending to various sectors including Jurong Island, Residential Areas, MRT Projects, Restorations, Buildings, National Events, and other ongoing island-wide projects.

Commitment to Safety and Quality:
Tristars Engineering places a high priority on safety and quality in every aspect of its business. This commitment has enabled the company to complete numerous successful projects while ensuring the safety and security of all employees and clients.

Vision and Mission:
The vision of Tristars Engineering is to deliver effective and efficient services within its scope of offerings, prioritizing quality and safety awareness in Singapore. The mission is to become the leading provider of scaffold works and manpower supply, creating a safe working environment that eliminates all injuries and incidents.

Safety Policy:
Safety is a core value at Tristars Engineering. The company's Risk Assessment Management Team takes a proactive approach to personal safety, as well as the safety of supervisors and workers. This commitment extends to ensuring the occupational health and safety of staff in all environments, including offices, dormitories, and work locations.

Commitment to Workers:
The company prioritizes the well-being and welfare of its workers, recognizing them as the backbone of its success. From comprehensive training covering various operational aspects to constant supervision and support for mental health and well-being, Tristars Engineering ensures its workforce is well taken care of.

description:
Our company, founded and based in Singapore, specializes in mechanical and electrical (M&E) design, focusing on regulatory compliance, cost and value optimization, and operational efficiency. While we meet government requirements for professional engineers in authority submissions, we go beyond compliance by integrating value engineering, aesthetic considerations, and customized solutions into our projects.
With the trust of our clients, we have expanded into international markets such as Timor-Leste and Thailand, and we are seeking further global opportunities.

In conservation projects, we prioritize heritage preservation while introducing modern functionality. Our expertise extends across multiple sectors, including commercial, residential, industrial, institutional, laboratories, healthcare, hospitality, transportation, marine, agriculture, smart cities, pharmaceuticals, energy, and defense.
By blending technical excellence with practical innovation, we create M&E designs that are compliant, efficient, and aesthetically integrated. Our commitment to quality ensures that our clients receive value-added solutions that meet their specific project goals.

description:
At RS ELECTRICAL & ENGINEERING(S) PTE. LTD. We specialize in providing top-quality electrical power system installation services, ensuring reliability, efficiency, and safety in every project. With a team of skilled professionals and years of expertise, we are committed to delivering innovative and high-standard solutions tailored to your needs.

Our Services:
 Site Presentation – Ensuring smooth execution with detailed planning.
 Equipment Installation – Precise setup of electrical components for optimal performance.
 Maintenance Service – Electrical switchgear system.
 Cable Laying & Termination – Secure and efficient wiring solutions.
 Busbar Installation – Reliable power distribution systems.
 Security & Surveillance Systems – Advanced CCTV and security solutions.
 Fire Alarm Systems – Comprehensive fire safety installations.
 HV & Low Voltage Testing – Ensuring system integrity and performance.
 ACMV Systems – Air conditioning and mechanical ventilation solutions.
 Testing & Commissioning – Quality assurance for seamless system operation.

 Specialist For Cable HV Test: A specialist in HV (High Voltage) cable testing is typically an engineer or technician with expertise in the design, installation, maintenance, and testing of high voltage power cables. Their role is to ensure that HV cables, which are used for transmitting electricity at high voltages, are safe, reliable, and perform correctly.
1. Conducting insulation resistance tests.
2. Performing partial discharge (PD) testing.
3. VLF (Very Low Frequency) testing.
4. Cable sheath testing.
5. Testing with hipot (high potential) or DC voltage.

We take pride in delivering excellence in electrical and engineering services, prioritizing safety, efficiency, and cutting-edge technology.

 Contact Us On Gmail: Rsengineering224@gmail.com
 Let’s power the future together! Connect with us to discuss your project needs us.

description:
We Max Consultants provides an extensive range of services, including Design Consultancy, Construction Supervision, Assessment and Inspection, Project Management, and Accredited Checking Services across various sectors such as real estate, infrastructure, institutional, industrial, transportation, and utilities.

With the assistance of our committed team of professionals, technical specialists, and support personnel, we offer optimal solutions that preserve resources, improve efficiency, and maximize results — all while maintaining the highest standards in the industry. The organization established itself through its relentless pursuit to satisfy the customers through providing services which are innovative, cost effective and of high quality. Our key elements contributing in achieving our aim are:

 	Strong expertise governing “Construction & Environmental Systems” in our projects,
 	Planning of works adopting “Value Engineering” concepts,
 	Personalized services with Clients, &
 	Bridging and pairing the right resources for the right projects.

Decades of experience in various projects undertaken in Singapore as follows:

 	MRT station Construction,
        Landed Property and HDB
 	TBM & MTBM Bored Tunnels,
 	Cut and Cover Tunnels,
 	Water treatment Plant,
 	Desalination plant,
 	Ground Improvement works,
 	Chemical factory projects,
 	Deep Sewer Tunnel projects,
 	Pipe Jacking works & Underpinning works,
 	High Rise building Construction, &
 	Steel structure works.
 	CCTV inspection and Reports

The organization had expanded to provide the following engineering services and solutions to major clients in India (Mumbai) in underground developments projects such as deep shaft construction and tunneling works:

 	Hard rock boring techniques,
 	Ground improvement methods,
 	Engineering study and recovery of Sewer tunnels at Mumbai,
 	Live sewer channel crossing tunnel construction adopting NATM method,
 	Pre-bidding consultancy services.

Working Programme: Developing and maintaining an updated project schedule to manage day-to-day operations effectively.
Tender Support: Assisting clients in preparing and evaluating tender documents to secure successful project bids.
Delay Analysis: Identifying and analyzing project delays to mitigate risks and implement corrective actions.
Aerial Drone Photography: Utilizing advanced drone technology to capture high-quality aerial images for project monitoring and documentation.

Their innovative approach, coupled with extensive industry expertise, positions them as a trusted partner in the field of project management.

description:
DESS Steel Engineering formerly known as K.U.S Metal Works is a company that specializes in design, fabrication, supply, and installation of structural steel and metal works for private and public development projects in Singapore. 

DESS Steel Engineering also provides technical advice and support to its customers by customizing products to meet their specific requirements. The Technical Team, consists of engineers with vast work experience and capabilities of producing detailed calculations based on customer needs, providing structural and product drawings before proceeding to fabrication.

The company offers a wide range of products, structural steel column and beam, precinct pavilion, link ways shelter, trellis, structural steel staircase, steel gratings, railings, solar panel mounting systems. All of these products meet the standards of the respective authorities, such as HDB, LTA, and PUB, and are subject to stringent quality control measures to ensure compliance with Singapore Standards (SS).

The company prides itself with its new technology and skilled workforce, and its goal is to become the market leader in producing quality-driven structural steel fabrications solutions in the industry. With its emphasis on quality control, technical expertise, and customer support, DESS Steel Engineering is well-positioned to serve the needs of private and public development projects in Singapore.

description:

Integrity is our core value, and it is the reason behind our success. Through the years, we have built a wide network of trusted partners, all whom share our vision, therefore enabling us to deliver value to our customers.

company_name: LAU TEO & YONG Chartered Quantity Surveyors | Building Economist
description:
LTY commenced practice as a chartered quantity surveying firm in 1966 and is the Singapore’s trusted quantity surveying consulting firm, delivering professional services throughout the project lifecycle – from feasibility studies to completion of the project with signing of final account.

Our scope of works include dealing with the financial, technical, contractual and functional aspects that modern design and construction are subjected to, from inception and pre-planning through to completion and analysis by covering the full range of public and private sectors. Our purpose is to add value that makes building/civil structure a better future possible. 

Our company is capable but not limited to the offering of the following services :-

• Feasibility Study.	
• Cost Planning and Budget Establishment during Feasibility Stage.	
• Value Engineering.		
• Budgetary Cost Monitoring during Design Stage.	
• Advise on Contractual Methods and Tendering Procedures.	
• Advise on Selection of Contractors.	
• Obtain or Negotiate Tenders.	
• Cash Flow Forecasts.	
• Valuation and Settlement of Construction Costs.	
• Financial Reviews for Tax and Accounting Purposes.
• Technical Auditing.
• Assessment of Building Replacement Values for Insurance.
• Project Management.
• Expert Evidence in Arbitration.
• Representing the Client / Contractor in Design and Build Contracts.
• Representing the Client / Contractor in Fast Track Design and Build Contracts.
